## õ║īŃĆüÕ«ēÕģ©ķÜöń”╗µ£║ÕłČ (Security)

õĮ£õĖ║ CS ÕŁ”ńö¤’╝īÕ”éµ×£õĮĀµā│ńö©Õ«āµØźÕüÜµüČµäÅĶĮ»õ╗ČÕłåµ×É (Malware Analysis) µł¢µĄŗĶ»ĢõĖŹÕ«ēÕģ©õ╗ŻńĀü’╝īõĮĀķ£ĆĶ”üõ║åĶ¦ŻÕ«āńÜäÕ«ēÕģ©ĶŠ╣ńĢī’╝Ü

6.1 õ║īÕłåµ¤źµēŠ

int binary_search(vector<int>& nums, int target) {
    int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1;
    while (left <= right) {
        int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;
        if (nums[mid] == target) return mid;
        else if (nums[mid] < target) left = mid + 1;
        else right = mid - 1;
    }
    return -1;
}

6.2 µĘ▒Õ║”õ╝śÕģłµÉ£ń┤ó (DFS)

void dfs(int u, vector<vector<int>>& adj, vector<bool>& visited) {
    visited[u] = true;
    for (int v : adj[u]) {
        if (!visited[v]) {
            dfs(v, adj, visited);
        }
    }
}

6.3 Õ╣┐Õ║”õ╝śÕģłµÉ£ń┤ó (BFS)

void bfs(int start, vector<vector<int>>& adj, vector<bool>& visited) {
    queue<int> q;
    q.push(start);
    visited[start] = true;
    while (!q.empty()) {
        int u = q.front();
        q.pop();
        for (int v : adj[u]) {
            if (!visited[v]) {
                visited[v] = true;
                q.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
}

6.4 Õ┐½ķĆ¤µÄÆÕ║Å

void quick_sort(vector<int>& nums, int left, int right) {
    if (left >= right) return;
    int pivot = nums[left + (right - left) / 2];
    int i = left, j = right;
    while (i <= j) {
        while (nums[i] < pivot) i++;
        while (nums[j] > pivot) j--;
        if (i <= j) {
            swap(nums[i], nums[j]);
            i++;
            j--;
        }
    }
    quick_sort(nums, left, j);
    quick_sort(nums, i, right);
}

    int lengthOfLIS(vector<int>& nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    vector<int> dp(n, 1);
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
        for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
            if (nums[i] > nums[j]) {
                dp[i] = max(dp[i], dp[j] + 1);
            }
        }
    }
    return *max_element(dp.begin(), dp.end());
}

void enumerate_subsets(int n)
{
    for (int mask = 0; mask < (1 << n); mask++)
    {
        bitset<32> bits(mask);
        cout << "Mask " << mask << ": ";
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {

                cout << i << " ";
            }
        }
        cout << endl;
    }
}

{

}

bitset<100> set_difference(const bitset<100>& a, const bitset<100>& b)

}

// µ¤źµēŠµ£Ćķ½śõĮŹńÜä 1
int find_highest_set_bit(int x)
{
    bitset<32> bits(x);
    int pos = -1;
    for (int i = 31; i >= 0; i--)
    {
        if (bits.test(i))
        {
            pos = i;
            break;
        }
    }
    return pos;
}

// µŚģĶĪīÕĢåķŚ«ķóś (TSP) ńŖČµĆüÕÄŗń╝® DP
int tsp(const vector<vector<int>>& dist)
{
    int n = dist.size();
    int full_mask = (1 << n) - 1;
    vector<vector<int>> dp(1 << n, vector<int>(n, INT_MAX));
    
    // ÕłØÕ¦ŗÕī¢’╝Üõ╗ÄÕÉäõĖ¬Õ¤ÄÕĖéÕć║ÕÅæ
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
    {
        dp[1 << i][i] = 0;
    }
    
    // ńŖČµĆüĶĮ¼ń¦╗
    for (int mask = 0; mask < (1 << n); mask++)
    {
        for (int u = 0; u < n; u++)
        {
            if (!(mask & (1 << u)) || dp[mask][u] == INT_MAX)
            {
                continue;
            }
            for (int v = 0; v < n; v++)
            {
                if (!(mask & (1 << v)) && dist[u][v] != INT_MAX)
                {
                    int new_mask = mask | (1 << v);
                    if (dp[new_mask][v] > dp[mask][u] + dist[u][v])
                    {
                        dp[new_mask][v] = dp[mask][u] + dist[u][v];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    // µēŠµ£ĆÕ░ÅĶĘ»ÕŠä
    int result = INT_MAX;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
    {
        if (dp[full_mask][i] != INT_MAX)
        {
            result = min(result, dp[full_mask][i] + dist[i][0]);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

// õĮŹÕøŠÕ«×ńÄ░
class BitMap
{
private:
    bitset<1000000> bits;
public:
    void set(int x)
    {
        bits.set(x);
    }
    
    void clear(int x)
    {
        bits.reset(x);
    }
    
    bool test(int x)
    {
        return bits.test(x);
    }
    
    int count()
    {
        return bits.count();
    }
};

// ńö©õ║ÄÕ┐½ķĆ¤ÕÄ╗ķćŹÕÆīÕŁśÕ£©µĆ¦µŻĆµ¤ź
void deduplicate(vector<int>& nums)
{
    bitset<1000000> seen;
    vector<int> result;
    
    for (int x : nums)
    {
        if (!seen.test(x))
        {
            seen.set(x);
            result.push_back(x);
        }
    }
    
    nums.swap(result);
}

Direction operator|(Direction a, Direction b)

}

int count_ones_slow(int x)

        x >>= 1;

// µŁŻńĪ«ÕüÜµ│Ģ’╝ÜõĮ┐ńö© bitset

// µł¢ĶĆģõĮ┐ńö© bitset µĢ░ń╗äÕżäńÉåµø┤Õż¦ńÜäĶīāÕø┤
const int MAX_SIZE = 10000000;
const int BITSET_SIZE = 1000000;
vector<bitset<BITSET_SIZE>> flags(MAX_SIZE / BITSET_SIZE + 1);

void set_bit(int x)
{
    int idx = x / BITSET_SIZE;
    int offset = x % BITSET_SIZE;
    flags[idx].set(offset);
}

bool test_bit(int x)
{
    int idx = x / BITSET_SIZE;
    int offset = x % BITSET_SIZE;
    return flags[idx].test(offset);
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

// ÕŁÉķøåµ×ÜõĖŠ
void enumerate_subsets(int n)
{
    for (int mask = 0; mask < (1 << n); mask++)
    {
        bitset<32> bits(mask);
        cout << "Mask " << mask << ": ";
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (bits.test(i))
            {
                cout << i << " ";
            }
        }
        cout << endl;
    }
}

// Õ┐½ķĆ¤ń╗¤Ķ«Īõ║īĶ┐øÕłČõĖŁ 1 ńÜäõĖ¬µĢ░
int count_ones(int x)
{
    return bitset<32>(x).count();
}

// µŻĆµ¤źµś»ÕÉ”µś» 2 ńÜäÕ╣é
bool is_power_of_two(int x)
{
    if (x == 0)
    {
        return false;
    }
    return bitset<32>(x).count() == 1;
}

// µ¤źµēŠµ£ĆõĮÄõĮŹńÜä 1
int find_lowest_set_bit(int x)
{
    if (x == 0)
    {
        return -1;
    }
    bitset<32> bits(x);
    return bits._Find_first();
}

// õĮŹÕøŠń▒╗
class BitMap
{
private:
    bitset<1000000> bits;
public:
    void set(int x)
    {
        bits.set(x);
    }
    
    void clear(int x)
    {
        bits.reset(x);
    }
    
    bool test(int x)
    {
        return bits.test(x);
    }
    
    int count()
    {
        return bits.count();
    }
};

// µŚģĶĪīÕĢåķŚ«ķóś (TSP) ńŖČµĆüÕÄŗń╝® DP
int tsp(const vector<vector<int>>& dist)
{
    int n = dist.size();
    int full_mask = (1 << n) - 1;
    vector<vector<int>> dp(1 << n, vector<int>(n, INT_MAX));
    
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
    {
        dp[1 << i][i] = 0;
    }
    
    for (int mask = 0; mask < (1 << n); mask++)
    {
        for (int u = 0; u < n; u++)
        {
            if (!(mask & (1 << u)) || dp[mask][u] == INT_MAX)
            {
                continue;
            }
            for (int v = 0; v < n; v++)
            {
                if (!(mask & (1 << v)) && dist[u][v] != INT_MAX)
                {
                    int new_mask = mask | (1 << v);
                    if (dp[new_mask][v] > dp[mask][u] + dist[u][v])
                    {
                        dp[new_mask][v] = dp[mask][u] + dist[u][v];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    int result = INT_MAX;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
    {
        if (dp[full_mask][i] != INT_MAX)
        {
            result = min(result, dp[full_mask][i] + dist[i][0]);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);
    
    // µĄŗĶ»ĢÕŁÉķøåµ×ÜõĖŠ
    cout << "ÕŁÉķøåµ×ÜõĖŠ (n=3): " << endl;
    enumerate_subsets(3);
    
    // µĄŗĶ»ĢõĮŹń╗¤Ķ«Ī
    int x = 42;  // 101010
    cout << "\nõ║īĶ┐øÕłČ " << bitset<8>(x) << " õĖŁ 1 ńÜäõĖ¬µĢ░: " << count_ones(x) << endl;
    cout << "µś»ÕÉ”µś» 2 ńÜäÕ╣é: " << is_power_of_two(x) << endl;
    cout << "µ£ĆõĮÄõĮŹńÜä 1 ńÜäõĮŹńĮ«: " << find_lowest_set_bit(x) << endl;
    
    // µĄŗĶ»ĢõĮŹÕøŠ
    BitMap bm;
    bm.set(10);
    bm.set(20);
    bm.set(30);
    cout << "\nõĮŹÕøŠõĖŁ 1 ńÜäõĖ¬µĢ░: " << bm.count() << endl;
    cout << "µĄŗĶ»ĢõĮŹ 10: " << bm.test(10) << endl;
    cout << "µĄŗĶ»ĢõĮŹ 15: " << bm.test(15) << endl;
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģ TSP
    vector<vector<int>> dist = {
        {0, 10, 15, 20},
        {10, 0, 35, 25},
        {15, 35, 0, 30},
        {20, 25, 30, 0}
    };
    int tsp_result = tsp(dist);
    cout << "\nTSP µ£Ćń¤ŁĶĘ»ÕŠä: " << tsp_result << endl;
    
    return 0;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

vector<int> max_sliding_window(vector<int>& nums, int k)
{
    vector<int> result;
    deque<int> dq;  // ÕŁśÕé©ń┤óÕ╝Ģ’╝īń╗┤µŖżÕŹĢĶ░āķĆÆÕćÅķś¤ÕłŚ
    
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++)
    {
        // ń¦╗ķÖżń¬ŚÕÅŻÕż¢ńÜäÕģāń┤Ā
        if (!dq.empty() && dq.front() == i - k)
        {
            dq.pop_front();
        }
        
        // ń╗┤µŖżÕŹĢĶ░āķĆÆÕćÅķś¤ÕłŚ
        while (!dq.empty() && nums[dq.back()] <= nums[i])
        {
            dq.pop_back();
        }
        
        dq.push_back(i);
        
        // ń¬ŚÕÅŻÕĮóµłÉÕÉÄÕ╝ĆÕ¦ŗĶ«░ÕĮĢń╗ōµ×£
        if (i >= k - 1)
        {
            result.push_back(nums[dq.front()]);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    vector<int> nums = {1, 3, -1, -3, 5, 3, 6, 7};
    int k = 3;
    vector<int> result = max_sliding_window(nums, k);
    
    cout << "µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝: ";
    for (int x : result)
    {
        cout << x << " ";  // 3 3 5 5 6 7
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    return 0;
}

vector<int> min_sliding_window(vector<int>& nums, int k)
{
    vector<int> result;
    deque<int> dq;  // ÕŁśÕé©ń┤óÕ╝Ģ’╝īń╗┤µŖżÕŹĢĶ░āķĆÆÕó×ķś¤ÕłŚ

    {
        // ń¦╗ķÖżń¬ŚÕÅŻÕż¢ńÜäÕģāń┤Ā
        if (!dq.empty() && dq.front() == i - k)

            dq.pop_front();

        if (i >= k - 1)
        {
            result.push_back(nums[dq.front()]);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

3.2 0-1 BFS

// 0-1 BFS ÕżäńÉåĶŠ╣µØāõĖ║ 0 µł¢ 1 ńÜäÕøŠ
vector<int> zero_one_bfs(int start, const vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<int> dist(n, INT_MAX);
    deque<int> dq;
    
    dist[start] = 0;
    dq.push_front(start);
    
    while (!dq.empty())
    {
        int u = dq.front();
        dq.pop_front();
        
        for (const auto& edge : adj[u])
        {
            int v = edge.first;
            int w = edge.second;
            if (dist[v] > dist[u] + w)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
                if (w == 0)
                {
                    dq.push_front(v);  // µØāÕĆ╝õĖ║ 0 µöŠÕ£©ķś¤ķ”¢
                }
                else
                {
                    dq.push_back(v);   // µØāÕĆ╝õĖ║ 1 µöŠÕ£©ķś¤Õ░Š
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

3.3 µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻõĖŁõĮŹµĢ░

// µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻõĖŁõĮŹµĢ░’╝łõĮ┐ńö©ÕÅīń½»ķś¤ÕłŚĶŠģÕŖ®’╝ē
vector<double> median_sliding_window(vector<int>& nums, int k)
{
    vector<double> result;
    multiset<int> window(nums.begin(), nums.begin() + k);
    auto mid = next(window.begin(), k / 2);
    
    for (int i = k; ; i++)
    {
        // Ķ«Īń«ŚõĖŁõĮŹµĢ░
        if (k % 2 == 0)
        {
            result.push_back((*mid + *prev(mid)) / 2.0);
        }
        else
        {
            result.push_back(*mid);
        }
        
        if (i == nums.size())
        {
            break;
        }
        
        // ń¦╗ķÖżń¬ŚÕÅŻÕĘ”ń½»Õģāń┤Ā
        window.insert(nums[i]);
        if (nums[i] < *mid)
        {
            mid--;
        }
        
        // µÅÆÕģźµ¢░Õģāń┤Ā
        if (nums[i - k] <= *mid)
        {
            mid++;
        }
        window.erase(window.lower_bound(nums[i - k]));
    }
    
    return result;
}

    {
        cout << "µēŠÕł░ 5 Õ£©õĮŹńĮ«: " << distance(dq.begin(), it) << endl;
    }
    
    // C++11: Ķ┐ćµ╗żÕüČµĢ░
    cout << "ÕüČµĢ░: ";
    for (int x : dq)
    {
        if (x % 2 == 0)
        {
            cout << x << " ";
        }
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    return 0;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

// µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝
vector<int> max_sliding_window(vector<int>& nums, int k)
{
    vector<int> result;
    deque<int> dq;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++)
    {
        // ń¦╗ķÖżń¬ŚÕÅŻÕż¢ńÜäÕģāń┤Ā
        if (!dq.empty() && dq.front() == i - k)
        {
            dq.pop_front();
        }
        
        // ń╗┤µŖżÕŹĢĶ░āķĆÆÕćÅķś¤ÕłŚ
        while (!dq.empty() && nums[dq.back()] <= nums[i])
        {
            dq.pop_back();
        }
        
        dq.push_back(i);
        
        // ń¬ŚÕÅŻÕĮóµłÉÕÉÄÕ╝ĆÕ¦ŗĶ«░ÕĮĢń╗ōµ×£
        if (i >= k - 1)
        {
            result.push_back(nums[dq.front()]);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

// 0-1 BFS
vector<int> zero_one_bfs(int start, const vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<int> dist(n, INT_MAX);
    deque<int> dq;
    
    dist[start] = 0;
    dq.push_front(start);
    
    while (!dq.empty())
    {
        int u = dq.front();
        dq.pop_front();
        
        for (const auto& edge : adj[u])
        {
            int v = edge.first;
            int w = edge.second;
            if (dist[v] > dist[u] + w)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
                if (w == 0)
                {
                    dq.push_front(v);
                }
                else
                {
                    dq.push_back(v);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

// ÕÅīń½»ķś¤ÕłŚÕ«×ńÄ░µĀł
class MyStack
{
private:
    deque<int> dq;
public:
    void push(int x)
    {
        dq.push_back(x);
    }
    
    int pop()
    {
        int x = dq.back();
        dq.pop_back();
        return x;
    }
    
    int top()
    {
        return dq.back();
    }
    
    bool empty()
    {
        return dq.empty();
    }
};

// ÕÅīń½»ķś¤ÕłŚÕ«×ńÄ░ķś¤ÕłŚ
class MyQueue
{
private:
    deque<int> dq;
public:
    void push(int x)
    {
        dq.push_back(x);
    }
    
    int pop()
    {
        int x = dq.front();
        dq.pop_front();
        return x;
    }
    
    int front()
    {
        return dq.front();
    }
    
    bool empty()
    {
        return dq.empty();
    }
};

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģµ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝
    vector<int> nums = {1, 3, -1, -3, 5, 3, 6, 7};
    int k = 3;
    vector<int> result = max_sliding_window(nums, k);
    
    cout << "µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝: ";
    for (int x : result)
    {
        cout << x << " ";
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģ 0-1 BFS
    int n = 4;
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> adj(n);
    adj[0] = {{1, 0}, {2, 1}};
    adj[1] = {{0, 0}, {3, 1}};
    adj[2] = {{0, 1}, {3, 0}};
    adj[3] = {{1, 1}, {2, 0}};
    
    vector<int> dist = zero_one_bfs(0, adj);
    cout << "0-1 BFS ĶĘØń”╗: ";
    for (int d : dist)
    {
        cout << d << " ";
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    // µĄŗĶ»ĢµĀłÕ«×ńÄ░
    MyStack stack;
    stack.push(1);
    stack.push(2);
    stack.push(3);
    cout << "µĀłķĪČ: " << stack.top() << endl;  // 3
    cout << "Õ╝╣Õć║: " << stack.pop() << endl;  // 3
    cout << "µĀłķĪČ: " << stack.top() << endl;  // 2
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģķś¤ÕłŚÕ«×ńÄ░
    MyQueue queue;
    queue.push(1);
    queue.push(2);
    queue.push(3);
    cout << "ķś¤ķ”¢: " << queue.front() << endl;  // 1
    cout << "Õ╝╣Õć║: " << queue.pop() << endl;  // 1
    cout << "ķś¤ķ”¢: " << queue.front() << endl;  // 2
    
    return 0;
}

4.1 Ķć¬Õ«Üõ╣ēµ»öĶŠāÕÖ©

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;
signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    // Ķć¬Õ«Üõ╣ēµ»öĶŠāÕÖ©’╝ÜµīēÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ķĢ┐Õ║”µÄÆÕ║Å
    struct CompareByLength
    {
        bool operator()(const string& a, const string& b) const
        {
            if (a.size() != b.size())
            {
                return a.size() < b.size();
            }
            return a < b;
        }
    };

    // õĮ┐ńö©Ķć¬Õ«Üõ╣ēµ»öĶŠāÕÖ©
    set<string, CompareByLength> s;

5.2 Õī║ķŚ┤ń╗┤µŖż

// ń╗┤µŖżÕī║ķŚ┤ńÜäµ┤╗ĶĘāńŖČµĆü’╝łõŠŗÕ”é’╝īõ╝ÜĶ««Õ«żķóäń║”’╝ē
map<int, int> intervals;  // start -> end

// µĘ╗ÕŖĀÕī║ķŚ┤ [start, end)
void add_interval(int start, int end)
{
    // µ¤źµēŠķćŹÕÅĀÕī║ķŚ┤
    auto it = intervals.lower_bound(start);
    while (it != intervals.end() && it->first < end)
    {
        start = min(start, it->first);
        end = max(end, it->second);
        intervals.erase(it++);
    }
    intervals[start] = end;
}

// µŻĆµ¤źÕī║ķŚ┤µś»ÕÉ”ń®║ķŚ▓
bool is_free(int start, int end)
{
    auto it = intervals.lower_bound(start);
    if (it != intervals.begin())
    {
        auto prev = prev(it);
        if (prev->second > start)
        {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return it == intervals.end() || it->first >= end;
}

// µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµēŠµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝’╝łõĮ┐ńö© multiset’╝ē
vector<int> max_sliding_window(vector<int>& nums, int k)
{
    vector<int> res;
    multiset<int, greater<int>> ms;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++)
    {
        ms.insert(nums[i]);
        if (i >= k - 1)
        {
            res.push_back(*ms.begin());
            ms.erase(ms.find(nums[i - k + 1]));
        }
    }
    
    return res;
}

3.1 Dijkstra ń«Śµ│Ģ’╝łµ£Ćń¤ŁĶĘ»ÕŠä’╝ē

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

using ll = long long;
using pii = pair<ll, int>;  // (ĶĘØń”╗, ĶŖéńé╣)

const ll INF = 1e18;

vector<ll> dijkstra(int start, const vector<vector<pii>>& g)
{
    int n = g.size();
    vector<ll> dist(n, INF);
    dist[start] = 0;
    
    // µ£ĆÕ░ÅÕĀå’╝īµīēĶĘØń”╗µÄÆÕ║Å
    priority_queue<pii, vector<pii>, greater<pii>> pq;
    pq.emplace(0, start);
    
    while (!pq.empty())
    {
        pair<ll, int> top = pq.top();
        ll d = top.first;
        int u = top.second;
        pq.pop();
        
        if (d > dist[u])
        {
            continue;  // µŚ¦ńÜäĶĘ»ÕŠä’╝īĶĘ│Ķ┐ć
        }
        
        for (const auto& edge : g[u])
        {
            int v = edge.first;
            ll w = edge.second;
            if (dist[v] > dist[u] + w)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
                pq.emplace(dist[v], v);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n, m, start;
    cin >> n >> m >> start;
    
    vector<vector<pii>> g(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
    {
        int u, v, w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        g[u].emplace_back(v, w);
    }
    
    vector<ll> dist = dijkstra(start, g);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
    {
        if (dist[i] == INF)
        {
            cout << "INF ";
        }
        else
        {
            cout << dist[i] << " ";
        }
    }
    
    return 0;
}

3.2 Ķ┤¬Õ┐āń«Śµ│Ģ

// µ┤╗ÕŖ©ķĆēµŗ®ķŚ«ķóś’╝łµ£ĆÕż¦õĖŹķćŹÕÅĀÕī║ķŚ┤’╝ē
struct Interval
{
    int start, end;
    bool operator<(const Interval& other) const
    {
        return end > other.end;  // µīēń╗ōµØ¤µŚČķŚ┤µÄÆÕ║Å’╝łµ£ĆÕ░ÅÕĀå’╝ē
    }
};

int max_non_overlapping(vector<Interval>& intervals)
{
    sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(), [](const Interval& a, const Interval& b)
    {
        return a.start < b.start;
    });
    
    priority_queue<Interval> pq;
    int count = 0;
    
    for (const auto& interval : intervals)
    {
        while (!pq.empty() && pq.top().end <= interval.start)
        {
            pq.pop();
        }
        pq.push(interval);
        count = max(count, (int)pq.size());
    }
    
    return count;
}

// ÕÉłÕ╣Č k õĖ¬µ£ēÕ║ÅķōŠĶĪ©
struct ListNode
{
    int val;
    ListNode* next;
    ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(nullptr) {}
};

struct CompareNode
{
    bool operator()(ListNode* a, ListNode* b)
    {
        return a->val > b->val;  // µ£ĆÕ░ÅÕĀå
    }
};

ListNode* merge_k_lists(vector<ListNode*>& lists)
{
    priority_queue<ListNode*, vector<ListNode*>, CompareNode> pq;
    
    for (ListNode* node : lists)
    {
        if (node)
        {
            pq.push(node);
        }
    }
    
    ListNode dummy(0);
    ListNode* tail = &dummy;
    
    while (!pq.empty())
    {
        ListNode* node = pq.top();
        pq.pop();
        
        tail->next = node;
        tail = tail->next;
        
        if (node->next)
        {
            pq.push(node->next);
        }
    }
    
    return dummy.next;
}

3.3 µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝

vector<int> max_sliding_window(vector<int>& nums, int k)
{
    vector<int> res;
    // µ£ĆÕż¦ÕĀå’╝īÕŁśÕé© (ÕĆ╝, ń┤óÕ╝Ģ)
    priority_queue<pair<int, int>> pq;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++)
    {
        pq.emplace(nums[i], i);
        
        // ń¦╗ķÖżń¬ŚÕÅŻÕż¢ńÜäÕģāń┤Ā
        while (pq.top().second <= i - k)
        {
            pq.pop();
        }
        
        if (i >= k - 1)
        {
            res.push_back(pq.top().first);
        }
    }
    
    return res;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

using ll = long long;
using pii = pair<ll, int>;

const ll INF = 1e18;

// Dijkstra ń«Śµ│Ģµ©ĪµØ┐
vector<ll> dijkstra(int start, const vector<vector<pii>>& g)
{
    int n = g.size();
    vector<ll> dist(n, INF);
    dist[start] = 0;
    
    priority_queue<pii, vector<pii>, greater<pii>> pq;
    pq.emplace(0, start);
    
    while (!pq.empty())
    {
        pii top = pq.top();
        ll d = top.first;
        int u = top.second;
        pq.pop();
        
        if (d > dist[u])
        {
            continue;
        }
        
        for (const auto& edge : g[u])
        {
            int v = edge.first;
            ll w = edge.second;
            if (dist[v] > dist[u] + w)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
                pq.emplace(dist[v], v);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

// Ķ┤¬Õ┐āń«Śµ│Ģ’╝Üµ£ĆÕż¦õĖŹķćŹÕÅĀÕī║ķŚ┤
struct Interval
{
    int start, end;
};

int max_non_overlapping(vector<Interval>& intervals)
{
    sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(), [](const Interval& a, const Interval& b)
    {
        return a.start < b.start;
    });
    
    priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<int>> pq;  // ÕŁśÕé©ń╗ōµØ¤µŚČķŚ┤
    int count = 0;
    
    for (const auto& interval : intervals)
    {
        while (!pq.empty() && pq.top() <= interval.start)
        {
            pq.pop();
        }
        pq.push(interval.end);
        count = max(count, (int)pq.size());
    }
    
    return count;
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģ Dijkstra
    int n, m, start;
    cin >> n >> m >> start;
    
    vector<vector<pii>> g(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
    {
        int u, v, w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        g[u].emplace_back(v, w);
    }
    
    vector<ll> dist = dijkstra(start, g);
    for (ll d : dist)
    {
        cout << (d == INF ? "INF" : to_string(d)) << " ";
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    return 0;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

void dfs(int start, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<bool> visited(n, false);
    stack<int> s;
    
    // ÕłØÕ¦ŗÕī¢
    s.push(start);
    visited[start] = true;
    
    while (!s.empty())
    {
        int u = s.top();
        s.pop();
        cout << u << " ";  // ÕżäńÉåĶŖéńé╣
        
        // Ķ«┐ķŚ«ķé╗µÄźńé╣’╝łµ│©µäÅķĪ║Õ║Å’╝īµĀłµś»ÕÉÄĶ┐øÕģłÕć║’╝īµēĆõ╗źÕÅŹÕ║ÅÕģźµĀł’╝ē
        for (auto it = adj[u].rbegin(); it != adj[u].rend(); ++it)
        {
            int v = *it;
            if (!visited[v])
            {
                visited[v] = true;
                s.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    // µ×äÕ╗║ķé╗µÄźĶĪ©
    int n = 6;
    vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
    adj[0] = {1, 2};
    adj[1] = {0, 3, 4};
    adj[2] = {0, 5};
    adj[3] = {1};
    adj[4] = {1};
    adj[5] = {2};
    
    cout << "DFS ķüŹÕÄåń╗ōµ×£: ";
    dfs(0, adj);  // 0 1 3 4 2 5
    cout << endl;
    
    return 0;
}

2.2 DFS µ▒éĶĘ»ÕŠä

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

bool dfs_path(int start, int end, const vector<vector<int>>& adj, vector<bool>& visited, vector<int>& path)
{
    visited[start] = true;
    path.push_back(start);
    
    if (start == end)
    {
        return true;
    }
    
    for (int v : adj[start])
    {
        if (!visited[v])
        {
            if (dfs_path(v, end, adj, visited, path))
            {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    
    path.pop_back();  // Õø×µ║»
    return false;
}

vector<int> find_path(int start, int end, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    vector<int> path;
    vector<bool> visited(adj.size(), false);
    dfs_path(start, end, adj, visited, path);
    return path;
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n = 6;
    vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
    adj[0] = {1, 2};
    adj[1] = {0, 3, 4};
    adj[2] = {0, 5};
    adj[3] = {1};
    adj[4] = {1};
    adj[5] = {2};
    
    vector<int> path = find_path(0, 5, adj);
    cout << "DFS ĶĘ»ÕŠä: ";
    for (int v : path)
    {
        cout << v << " ";  // 0 2 5
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    return 0;
}

õĖēŃĆüń½×ĶĄøÕ«×µłśÕ║öńö©

3.1 ĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Åµ▒éÕĆ╝

// Ķ«Īń«ŚÕÉÄń╝ĆĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Å
int evaluate_postfix(const vector<string>& tokens)
{
    stack<int> s;
    
    for (const string& token : tokens)
    {
        if (token == "+" || token == "-" || token == "*" || token == "/")
        {
            int b = s.top();
            s.pop();
            int a = s.top();
            s.pop();
            
            if (token == "+") s.push(a + b);
            else if (token == "-") s.push(a - b);
            else if (token == "*") s.push(a * b);
            else if (token == "/") s.push(a / b);
        }
        else
        {
            s.push(stoi(token));
        }
    }
    
    return s.top();
}

// õĖŁń╝ĆĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝ÅĶĮ¼ÕÉÄń╝ĆĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Å
vector<string> infix_to_postfix(const string& expr)
{
    vector<string> postfix;
    stack<char> op_stack;
    unordered_map<char, int> precedence = {{'+', 1}, {'-', 1}, {'*', 2}, {'/', 2}, {'^', 3}};
    
    for (int i = 0; i < expr.size(); i++)
    {
        char c = expr[i];
        if (isdigit(c))
        {
            string num;
            while (i < expr.size() && isdigit(expr[i]))
            {
                num += expr[i++];
            }
            i--;
            postfix.push_back(num);
        }
        else if (c == '(')
        {
            op_stack.push(c);
        }
        else if (c == ')')
        {
            while (!op_stack.empty() && op_stack.top() != '(')
            {
                postfix.push_back(string(1, op_stack.top()));
                op_stack.pop();
            }
            op_stack.pop();  // Õ╝╣Õć║ '('
        }
        else if (precedence.count(c))
        {
            while (!op_stack.empty() && precedence.count(op_stack.top()) && 
                   precedence[op_stack.top()] >= precedence[c])
            {
                postfix.push_back(string(1, op_stack.top()));
                op_stack.pop();
            }
            op_stack.push(c);
        }
    }
    
    while (!op_stack.empty())
    {
        postfix.push_back(string(1, op_stack.top()));
        op_stack.pop();
    }
    
    return postfix;
}

bool is_valid_parentheses(const string& s)
{
    stack<char> stk;
    unordered_map<char, char> mapping = {{')', '('}, {']', '['}, {'}', '{'}};
    
    for (char c : s)
    {
        if (mapping.count(c))
        {
            char top_element = stk.empty() ? '#' : stk.top();
            stk.pop();
            if (top_element != mapping[c])
            {
                return false;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            stk.push(c);
        }
    }
    
    return stk.empty();
}

// µ»ÅµŚźµĖ®Õ║”
vector<int> daily_temperatures(vector<int>& temperatures)
{
    int n = temperatures.size();
    vector<int> result(n, 0);
    stack<int> stk;  // ÕŁśÕé©ń┤óÕ╝Ģ
    
    for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--)
    {
        while (!stk.empty() && temperatures[stk.top()] <= temperatures[i])
        {
            stk.pop();
        }
        result[i] = stk.empty() ? 0 : stk.top() - i;
        stk.push(i);
    }
    
    return result;
}

// õĖŗõĖĆõĖ¬µø┤Õż¦Õģāń┤Ā
vector<int> next_greater_element(vector<int>& nums)
{
    int n = nums.size();
    vector<int> result(n, -1);
    stack<int> stk;
    
    for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--)
    {
        while (!stk.empty() && stk.top() <= nums[i])
        {
            stk.pop();
        }
        result[i] = stk.empty() ? -1 : stk.top();
        stk.push(nums[i]);
    }
    
    return result;
}

3.4 õ║īÕÅēµĀæķüŹÕÄå

// õ║īÕÅēµĀæń╗ōµ×ä
struct TreeNode
{
    int val;
    TreeNode* left;
    TreeNode* right;
    TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(nullptr), right(nullptr) {}
};

// ÕēŹÕ║ÅķüŹÕÄå’╝łķØ×ķĆÆÕĮÆ’╝ē
vector<int> preorder_traversal(TreeNode* root)
{
    vector<int> result;
    if (!root)
    {
        return result;
    }
    
    stack<TreeNode*> stk;
    stk.push(root);
    
    while (!stk.empty())
    {
        TreeNode* node = stk.top();
        stk.pop();
        result.push_back(node->val);
        
        // ÕģłÕÄŗÕÅ│ÕŁÉµĀæ’╝īÕåŹÕÄŗÕĘ”ÕŁÉµĀæ
        if (node->right)
        {
            stk.push(node->right);
        }
        if (node->left)
        {
            stk.push(node->left);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

// õĖŁÕ║ÅķüŹÕÄå’╝łķØ×ķĆÆÕĮÆ’╝ē
vector<int> inorder_traversal(TreeNode* root)
{
    vector<int> result;
    stack<TreeNode*> stk;
    TreeNode* current = root;
    
    while (current || !stk.empty())
    {
        while (current)
        {
            stk.push(current);
            current = current->left;
        }
        
        current = stk.top();
        stk.pop();
        result.push_back(current->val);
        current = current->right;
    }
    
    return result;
}

// ÕÉÄÕ║ÅķüŹÕÄå’╝łķØ×ķĆÆÕĮÆ’╝ē
vector<int> postorder_traversal(TreeNode* root)
{
    vector<int> result;
    if (!root)
    {
        return result;
    }
    
    stack<TreeNode*> stk1, stk2;
    stk1.push(root);
    
    while (!stk1.empty())
    {
        TreeNode* node = stk1.top();
        stk1.pop();
        stk2.push(node);
        
        if (node->left)
        {
            stk1.push(node->left);
        }
        if (node->right)
        {
            stk1.push(node->right);
        }
    }
    
    while (!stk2.empty())
    {
        result.push_back(stk2.top()->val);
        stk2.pop();
    }
    
    return result;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

// Õ¤║µ£¼ DFS
void dfs(int start, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<bool> visited(n, false);
    stack<int> s;
    
    s.push(start);
    visited[start] = true;
    
    while (!s.empty())
    {
        int u = s.top();
        s.pop();
        cout << u << " ";
        
        for (auto it = adj[u].rbegin(); it != adj[u].rend(); ++it)
        {
            int v = *it;
            if (!visited[v])
            {
                visited[v] = true;
                s.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
    cout << endl;
}

// µŗ¼ÕÅĘÕī╣ķģŹ
bool is_valid_parentheses(const string& s)
{
    stack<char> stk;
    unordered_map<char, char> mapping = {{')', '('}, {']', '['}, {'}', '{'}};
    
    for (char c : s)
    {
        if (mapping.count(c))
        {
            char top_element = stk.empty() ? '#' : stk.top();
            stk.pop();
            if (top_element != mapping[c])
            {
                return false;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            stk.push(c);
        }
    }
    
    return stk.empty();
}

vector<int> daily_temperatures(vector<int>& temperatures)
{
    int n = temperatures.size();
    vector<int> result(n, 0);
    stack<int> stk;

    }
    
    return result;
}

// ĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Åµ▒éÕĆ╝
int evaluate_postfix(const vector<string>& tokens)
{
    stack<int> s;
    
    for (const string& token : tokens)
    {
        if (token == "+" || token == "-" || token == "*" || token == "/")
        {
            int b = s.top();
            s.pop();
            int a = s.top();
            s.pop();
            
            if (token == "+" || token == "-") s.push(token == "+" ? a + b : a - b);
            else s.push(token == "*" ? a * b : a / b);
        }
        else
        {
            s.push(stoi(token));
        }
    }
    
    return s.top();
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģ DFS
    int n = 6;
    vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
    adj[0] = {1, 2};
    adj[1] = {0, 3, 4};
    adj[2] = {0, 5};
    adj[3] = {1};
    adj[4] = {1};
    adj[5] = {2};
    
    cout << "DFS ķüŹÕÄå: ";
    dfs(0, adj);
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģµŗ¼ÕÅĘÕī╣ķģŹ
    string s = "{[]()}";
    cout << "µŗ¼ÕÅĘÕī╣ķģŹ: " << (is_valid_parentheses(s) ? "µ£ēµĢł" : "µŚĀµĢł") << endl;
    
    // µĄŗĶ»Ģµ»ÅµŚźµĖ®Õ║”
    vector<int> temperatures = {73, 74, 75, 71, 69, 72, 76, 73};
    vector<int> result = daily_temperatures(temperatures);
    cout << "µ»ÅµŚźµĖ®Õ║”: ";
    for (int x : result)
    {
        cout << x << " ";
    }
    cout << endl;
    
    // µĄŗĶ»ĢĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Åµ▒éÕĆ╝
    vector<string> tokens = {"2", "1", "+", "3", "*"};
    cout << "ĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Åµ▒éÕĆ╝: " << evaluate_postfix(tokens) << endl;  // (2+1)*3=9
    
    return 0;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

void bfs(int start, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<bool> visited(n, false);
    queue<int> q;
    
    // ÕłØÕ¦ŗÕī¢
    q.push(start);
    visited[start] = true;
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int u = q.front();
        q.pop();
        cout << u << " ";  // ÕżäńÉåĶŖéńé╣
        
        // Ķ«┐ķŚ«ķé╗µÄźńé╣
        for (int v : adj[u])
        {
            if (!visited[v])
            {

                q.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

vector<int> shortest_path(int start, int end, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<int> dist(n, -1);
    vector<int> parent(n, -1);
    queue<int> q;
    
    q.push(start);
    dist[start] = 0;
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int u = q.front();
        q.pop();
        
        if (u == end)
        {
            break;  // µēŠÕł░ń╗łńé╣
        }
        
        for (int v : adj[u])
        {
            if (dist[v] == -1)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;
                parent[v] = u;
                q.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // ķćŹÕ╗║ĶĘ»ÕŠä
    vector<int> path;
    if (dist[end] == -1)
    {
        return path;  // µŚĀĶĘ»ÕŠä
    }
    
    for (int v = end; v != -1; v = parent[v])
    {
        path.push_back(v);
    }
    reverse(path.begin(), path.end());
    return path;
}

3.1 Õ▒éÕ║ÅķüŹÕÄå

// õ║īÕÅēµĀæÕ▒éÕ║ÅķüŹÕÄå
struct TreeNode
{
    int val;
    TreeNode* left;
    TreeNode* right;
    TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(nullptr), right(nullptr) {}
};

vector<vector<int>> level_order(TreeNode* root)
{
    vector<vector<int>> result;
    if (!root)
    {
        return result;
    }
    
    queue<TreeNode*> q;
    q.push(root);
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int level_size = q.size();
        vector<int> level;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < level_size; i++)
        {
            TreeNode* node = q.front();
            q.pop();
            level.push_back(node->val);
            
            if (node->left)
            {
                q.push(node->left);
            }
            if (node->right)
            {
                q.push(node->right);
            }
        }
        
        result.push_back(level);
    }
    
    return result;
}

3.2 ÕżÜµ║É BFS

// ÕżÜµ║É BFS µ▒éµ£Ćń¤ŁĶĘØń”╗
vector<vector<int>> multi_source_bfs(int n, int m, const vector<pair<int, int>>& sources)
{
    vector<vector<int>> dist(n, vector<int>(m, -1));
    queue<pair<int, int>> q;
    
    // ÕłØÕ¦ŗÕī¢ÕżÜõĖ¬µ║Éńé╣
    for (const auto& source : sources)
    {
        int x = source.first;
        int y = source.second;
        dist[x][y] = 0;
        q.emplace(x, y);
    }
    
    // ÕøøõĖ¬µ¢╣ÕÉæ
    int dx[] = {-1, 1, 0, 0};
    int dy[] = {0, 0, -1, 1};
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        pair<int, int> front = q.front();
        int x = front.first;
        int y = front.second;
        q.pop();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            int nx = x + dx[i];
            int ny = y + dy[i];
            if (nx >= 0 && nx < n && ny >= 0 && ny < m && dist[nx][ny] == -1)
            {
                dist[nx][ny] = dist[x][y] + 1;
                q.emplace(nx, ny);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

// 0-1 BFS ÕżäńÉåĶŠ╣µØāõĖ║ 0 µł¢ 1 ńÜäÕøŠ
vector<int> zero_one_bfs(int start, const vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<int> dist(n, INT_MAX);
    deque<int> dq;  // õĮ┐ńö©ÕÅīń½»ķś¤ÕłŚ
    
    dist[start] = 0;
    dq.push_front(start);
    
    while (!dq.empty())
    {
        int u = dq.front();
        dq.pop_front();
        
        for (const auto& edge : adj[u])
        {
            int v = edge.first;
            int w = edge.second;
            if (dist[v] > dist[u] + w)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
                if (w == 0)
                {
                    dq.push_front(v);  // µØāÕĆ╝õĖ║ 0 µöŠÕ£©ķś¤ķ”¢
                }
                else
                {
                    dq.push_back(v);   // µØāÕĆ╝õĖ║ 1 µöŠÕ£©ķś¤Õ░Š
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'

using namespace std;

// Õ¤║µ£¼ BFS
void bfs(int start, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<bool> visited(n, false);
    queue<int> q;
    
    q.push(start);
    visited[start] = true;
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int u = q.front();
        q.pop();
        cout << u << " ";
        
        for (int v : adj[u])
        {
            if (!visited[v])
            {
                visited[v] = true;
                q.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
    cout << endl;
}

// BFS µ▒éµ£Ćń¤ŁĶĘ»ÕŠä
vector<int> shortest_path(int start, int end, const vector<vector<int>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<int> dist(n, -1);
    vector<int> parent(n, -1);
    queue<int> q;
    
    q.push(start);
    dist[start] = 0;
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int u = q.front();
        q.pop();
        
        if (u == end)
        {
            break;
        }
        
        for (int v : adj[u])
        {
            if (dist[v] == -1)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;
                parent[v] = u;
                q.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
    
    vector<int> path;
    if (dist[end] == -1)
    {
        return path;
    }
    
    for (int v = end; v != -1; v = parent[v])
    {
        path.push_back(v);
    }
    reverse(path.begin(), path.end());
    return path;
}

// ÕżÜµ║É BFS
vector<vector<int>> multi_source_bfs(int n, int m, const vector<pair<int, int>>& sources)
{
    vector<vector<int>> dist(n, vector<int>(m, -1));
    queue<pair<int, int>> q;
    
    for (const auto& source : sources)
    {
        int x = source.first;
        int y = source.second;
        dist[x][y] = 0;
        q.emplace(x, y);
    }
    
    int dx[] = {-1, 1, 0, 0};
    int dy[] = {0, 0, -1, 1};
    
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        pair<int, int> front = q.front();
        int x = front.first;
        int y = front.second;
        q.pop();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            int nx = x + dx[i];
            int ny = y + dy[i];
            if (nx >= 0 && nx < n && ny >= 0 && ny < m && dist[nx][ny] == -1)
            {
                dist[nx][ny] = dist[x][y] + 1;
                q.emplace(nx, ny);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

// 0-1 BFS
vector<int> zero_one_bfs(int start, const vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>& adj)
{
    int n = adj.size();
    vector<int> dist(n, INT_MAX);
    deque<int> dq;
    
    dist[start] = 0;
    dq.push_front(start);
    
    while (!dq.empty())
    {
        int u = dq.front();
        dq.pop_front();
        
        for (const auto& edge : adj[u])
        {
            int v = edge.first;
            int w = edge.second;
            if (dist[v] > dist[u] + w)
            {
                dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
                if (w == 0)
                {
                    dq.push_front(v);
                }
                else
                {
                    dq.push_back(v);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return dist;
}

    adj[0] = {1, 2};

    adj[3] = {1};
    adj[4] = {1};
    adj[5] = {2};

    cout << "ÕżÜµ║É BFS ĶĘØń”╗ń¤®ķśĄ: " << endl;

}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'

using namespace std;
signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    // ÕłØÕ¦ŗÕī¢
    unordered_map<string, int> ump;
    
    // µÅÆÕģźÕģāń┤Ā
    ump["apple"] = 100;
    ump.insert({"banana", 80});
    ump.emplace("orange", 120);  // C++11
    
    // µ¤źµēŠÕģāń┤Ā
    auto it = ump.find("apple");
    if (it != ump.end())
    {

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'

// Ķć¬Õ«Üõ╣ēń╗ōµ×äõĮō
struct Point
{

    bool operator==(const Point& other) const
    {
        return x == other.x && y == other.y;
    }
};

// Ķć¬Õ«Üõ╣ēÕōłÕĖīÕćĮµĢ░
namespace std
{
    template<>
    struct hash<Point>
    {
        size_t operator()(const Point& p) const
        {
            // ń╗äÕÉłÕōłÕĖīÕĆ╝
            size_t h1 = hash<int>()(p.x);
            size_t h2 = hash<int>()(p.y);
            return h1 ^ (h2 << 1);
        }
    };
}

{

}

3.3 õĮ┐ńö© boost ÕōłÕĖī’╝łń½×ĶĄøõĖŁõĖŹµÄ©ĶŹÉ’╝ē

// µ│©µäÅ’╝Üń½×ĶĄøńÄ»ÕóāķĆÜÕĖĖõĖŹµö»µīü boost
#include <boost/functional/hash.hpp>

struct Point
{
    int x, y;
    bool operator==(const Point& other) const
    {
        return x == other.x && y == other.y;
    }
};

namespace std
{
    template<>
    struct hash<Point>
    {
        size_t operator()(const Point& p) const
        {
            size_t seed = 0;
            boost::hash_combine(seed, p.x);
            boost::hash_combine(seed, p.y);
            return seed;
        }
    };
}

// µ¤źµēŠµś»ÕÉ”ÕŁśÕ£©ķćŹÕżŹÕģāń┤Ā
bool has_duplicate(const vector<int>& nums)
{
    unordered_set<int> seen;
    for (int x : nums)
    {
        if (seen.count(x))
        {
            return true;
        }
        seen.insert(x);
    }
    return false;
}

// õĖżµĢ░õ╣ŗÕÆī
vector<int> two_sum(const vector<int>& nums, int target)
{
    unordered_map<int, int> val_to_idx;
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++)
    {
        int complement = target - nums[i];
        if (val_to_idx.count(complement))
        {
            return {val_to_idx[complement], i};
        }
        val_to_idx[nums[i]] = i;
    }
    return {};
}

// Ķ«░Õ┐åÕī¢µÉ£ń┤ó’╝łµ¢Éµ│óķéŻÕźæ’╝ē
unordered_map<int, long long> memo;

long long fib(int n)
{
    if (n <= 1)
    {
        return n;
    }
    if (memo.count(n))
    {
        return memo[n];
    }
    memo[n] = fib(n-1) + fib(n-2);
    return memo[n];
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

// C++11: µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕēŹń╝Ć
bool starts_with(const string& s, const string& prefix)
{
    return s.size() >= prefix.size() && s.compare(0, prefix.size(), prefix) == 0;
}

// C++11: µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”ÕēŹń╝Ć
bool starts_with(const string& s, char c)
{
    return !s.empty() && s[0] == c;
}

// C++11: µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕÉÄń╝Ć
bool ends_with(const string& s, const string& suffix)
{
    return s.size() >= suffix.size() && s.compare(s.size() - suffix.size(), suffix.size(), suffix) == 0;
}

// C++11: µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”ÕÉÄń╝Ć
bool ends_with(const string& s, char c)
{
    return !s.empty() && s.back() == c;
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    string s = "Hello, world!";
    
    if (starts_with(s, "Hello"))
    {
        cout << "Starts with Hello" << endl;
    }
    
    if (starts_with(s, 'H'))
    {
        cout << "Starts with H" << endl;
    }
    
    if (ends_with(s, "!"))
    {
        cout << "Ends with !" << endl;
    }
    
    if (ends_with(s, "world!"))
    {
        cout << "Ends with world!" << endl;
    }
    
    return 0;
}

void reverse_inplace(string& s)
{
    int n = s.size();
    for (int i = 0; i < n / 2; i++)

        swap(s[i], s[n - 1 - i]);
    }
}

bool is_palindrome(const string& s)
{
    int n = s.size();
    for (int i = 0; i < n / 2; i++)
    {
        if (s[i] != s[n - 1 - i])
        {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

// õĮ┐ńö©ÕÅīµīćķÆł
bool is_palindrome2(const string& s)
{
    int left = 0, right = s.size() - 1;
    while (left < right)
    {
        if (s[left] != s[right])
        {
            return false;
        }
        left++;
        right--;
    }
    return true;
}

5.5 ÕŁÉõĖ▓µ¤źµēŠ

// KMP ń«Śµ│Ģ’╝łķ½śµĢłµ¤źµēŠÕŁÉõĖ▓’╝ē
vector<int> compute_lps(const string& pattern)
{
    int n = pattern.size();
    vector<int> lps(n, 0);
    for (int i = 1, len = 0; i < n; )
    {
        if (pattern[i] == pattern[len])
        {
            lps[i++] = ++len;
        }
        else if (len > 0)
        {
            len = lps[len - 1];
        }
        else
        {
            lps[i++] = 0;
        }
    }
    return lps;
}

vector<int> kmp_search(const string& text, const string& pattern)
{
    vector<int> result;
    int n = text.size(), m = pattern.size();
    if (m == 0) return result;
    
    vector<int> lps = compute_lps(pattern);
    for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < n; )
    {
        if (pattern[j] == text[i])
        {
            i++;
            j++;
            if (j == m)
            {
                result.push_back(i - j);
                j = lps[j - 1];
            }
        }
        else if (j > 0)
        {
            j = lps[j - 1];
        }
        else
        {
            i++;
        }
    }
    return result;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

// ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕłåÕē▓
vector<string> split(const string& s, char delimiter)
{

    string token;
    istringstream tokenStream(s);
    while (getline(tokenStream, token, delimiter))
    {
        tokens.push_back(token);
    }
    return tokens;
}

// µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕēŹń╝Ć
bool starts_with(const string& s, const string& prefix)
{
    return s.size() >= prefix.size() && s.compare(0, prefix.size(), prefix) == 0;
}

// µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕÉÄń╝Ć
bool ends_with(const string& s, const string& suffix)
{

}

// µŻĆµ¤źÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕīģÕÉ½
bool contains(const string& s, const string& substr)
{

}

// Õø×µ¢ćõĖ▓Õłżµ¢Ł
bool is_palindrome(const string& s)
{
    int left = 0, right = s.size() - 1;
    while (left < right)
    {

        {

// KMP ń«Śµ│Ģ
vector<int> kmp_search(const string& text, const string& pattern)
{
    vector<int> result;
    int n = text.size(), m = pattern.size();
    if (m == 0) return result;
    
    vector<int> lps(m, 0);
    for (int i = 1, len = 0; i < m; )
    {
        if (pattern[i] == pattern[len])
        {
            lps[i++] = ++len;
        }
        else if (len > 0)
        {
            len = lps[len - 1];
        }
        else
        {
            lps[i++] = 0;
        }
    }
    
    for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < n; )
    {
        if (pattern[j] == text[i])
        {
            i++;
            j++;
            if (j == m)
            {
                result.push_back(i - j);
                j = lps[j - 1];
            }
        }
        else if (j > 0)
        {
            j = lps[j - 1];
        }
        else
        {
            i++;
        }
    }
    return result;
}

    cout << "Pattern found at positions: ";

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;
// import java.math.*;  

public class Main
{
    // Õ«Üõ╣ēÕģ©Õ▒ĆÕ┐½Ķ»╗ÕĘźÕģĘst
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));  // ÕģČÕ«×µś»ÕŠłÕźĮĶ«░ńÜä’╝īÕ”éµ×£Õć║µØźõ╗ŻńĀüĶĪźÕģ©TabÕ░▒õĖĆõĖŗńÜäõ║ŗ
    // Õ░üĶŻģ4õĖ¬µ£ĆÕĖĖńö©ńÜäĶ»╗ÕÅ¢ÕćĮµĢ░
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int) st.nval; }
    static long nl() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (long) st.nval; }
    static double nd() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.nval; }
    static String ns() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.sval;}

    public static class Node
    {
        String name;
        int score;
        Node(String n, int s) { name = n; score = s; }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception  // õĖĆńé╣Ķ┐ćĶ”üµ£ēµŖøÕć║Õ╝éÕĖĖ’╝łthrows Exception’╝ēõĖĆńø┤ÕÉæõĖŖµŖøÕć║Õ╝éÕĖĖ’╝īµ£Ćń╗łõ║żń╗ÖJVMÕżäńÉå’╝īÕ░▒õĖŹńö©Ķć¬ÕĘ▒ÕåÖtryõ║å
    {
        int n = ni();  // Ķ»╗ÕÅ¢n
        Node[] nodes = new Node[n];  // ÕłøÕ╗║µĢ░ń╗ä’╝īÕÅ¬µ£ēÕ╝Ģńö©’╝īµ▓Īµ£ēÕ»╣Ķ▒Ī
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            nodes[i] = new Node(ns(), ni());  // ÕłøÕ╗║Õ»╣Ķ▒ĪÕ╣ČĶĄŗÕĆ╝ń╗ÖµĢ░ń╗äÕģāń┤Ā
        }

        // µÄÆÕ║Å’╝īõĮ┐ńö©LamadaÕćĮµĢ░
        Arrays.sort(nodes, (a, b) ->
        {
            if (a.score != b.score) return b.score - a.score;  // µ│©µäÅ’╝Üa-bÕ░▒µś»õ╗ÄÕ░ÅÕł░Õż¦õ║å
            else return a.name.compareTo(b.name);
        });

        // ĶŠōÕć║’╝īõĮ┐ńö©ĶīāÕø┤forÕŠ¬ńÄ»
        for (Node node : nodes) System.out.println(node.name + " " + node.score);
    }
}

õĖēŃĆü Õ«×µłś’╝ÜµŖŖķØóÕÉæÕ»╣Ķ▒ĪÕÆīÕ┐½Ķ»╗ń╗ōÕÉł

ÕüćĶ«Šķóśńø«’╝ÜĶŠōÕģźNõĖ¬ÕŁ”ńö¤ńÜäõ┐Īµü»’╝łÕ¦ōÕÉŹŃĆüµłÉń╗®’╝ē’╝īµīēńģ¦µłÉń╗®ķÖŹÕ║ÅµÄÆÕ║Å’╝īÕ”éµ×£µłÉń╗®ńøĖÕÉīµīēÕ¦ōÕÉŹÕŹćÕ║ÅŃĆé

Ķ┐ÖÕ░▒µś»µ£ĆÕģĖÕ×ŗńÜäŌĆ£ķØóÕÉæÕ»╣Ķ▒ĪŌĆØĶĆāĶ»ĢķóśŃĆé

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;
// import java.math.*;

// Õ«Üõ╣ēõĖĆõĖ¬ń▒╗’╝łńøĖÕĮōõ║Ä C++ ńÜä struct + ÕćĮµĢ░’╝ē
class Student implements Comparable<Student>  // implements Comparable µś»õĖ║õ║åĶāĮµÄÆÕ║Å
{
    String name;
    int score;

    // µ×äķĆĀµ¢╣µ│Ģ (Constructor)
    public Student(String name, int score)
    {
        this.name = name;
        this.score = score;
    }

    // ķćŹÕåÖµÄÆÕ║ÅķĆ╗ĶŠæ (Override)
    @Override
    public int compareTo(Student other)
    {
        if (this.score != other.score)
        {
            return other.score - this.score;  // ķÖŹÕ║Å’╝ÜÕÉÄÕćÅÕēŹ
        }
        return this.name.compareTo(other.name);  // ÕŹćÕ║Å’╝ÜJava String Ķć¬ÕĖ” compareTo
    }
}

public class Main
{
    // õĮĀńÜäÕ┐½Ķ»╗µ©ĪµØ┐
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }
    static String ns() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.sval; }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        // ÕłøÕ╗║Õ»╣Ķ▒ĪµĢ░ń╗ä
        Student[] arr = new Student[n];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            String name = ns();
            int score = ni();
            // Õ«×õŠŗÕī¢Õ»╣Ķ▒Ī (new)
            arr[i] = new Student(name, score);
        }

        // µÄÆÕ║Å (ńö▒õ║Ä Student Õ«×ńÄ░õ║å Comparable’╝īĶ┐ÖķćīÕÅ»õ╗źńø┤µÄź sort)
        Arrays.sort(arr);

        // ĶŠōÕć║
        for (Student s : arr)
        {
            System.out.println(s.name + " " + s.score);
        }
    }
}

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main
{
    // Õ┐½Ķ»╗µ©ĪµØ┐
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }
    static String ns() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.sval; }

    // ķØóÕÉæÕ»╣Ķ▒Ī’╝ÜµŖŖÕŁ”ńö¤Õ░üĶŻģµłÉõĖĆõĖ¬ń▒╗
    static class Student implements Comparable<Student>
    {
        String name;
        int chinese, math, total;

        public Student(String name, int chinese, int math)
        {
            this.name = name;
            this.chinese = chinese;
            this.math = math;
            this.total = chinese + math;
        }

        // µĀĖÕ┐āĶĆāńé╣’╝ÜķćŹÕåÖµ»öĶŠāĶ¦äÕłÖ
        @Override
        public int compareTo(Student other)
        {
            if (this.total != other.total)
            {
                return other.total - this.total; // ķÖŹÕ║Å’╝ÜÕł½õ║║ÕćÅµłæ
            }
            if (this.math != other.math)
            {
                return other.math - this.math;   // ķÖŹÕ║Å’╝ÜÕł½õ║║ÕćÅµłæ
            }
            return this.name.compareTo(other.name); // ÕŹćÕ║Å’╝ÜStringĶć¬ÕĖ”’╝īµłæµ»öÕł½õ║║
        }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        Student[] arr = new Student[n]; // Õ»╣Ķ▒ĪµĢ░ń╗ä

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            // Õ«×õŠŗÕī¢Õ»╣Ķ▒ĪÕŁśÕģźµĢ░ń╗ä
            arr[i] = new Student(ns(), ni(), ni());
        }

        Arrays.sort(arr);  // õĖĆķö«µÄÆÕ║Å’╝īõ╝ÜĶć¬ÕŖ©Ķ░āńö©µłæõ╗¼ÕåÖńÜä compareTo

        for (Student s : arr)
        {   
            System.out.println(s.name + " " + s.total + " " + s.math);
        }
    }
}

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;
import java.math.*;

public class Main
{
    // st
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int) st.nval; }
    static String ns() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.sval; }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        // µłæĶ”üµĢ░ń╗ä
        Student[]  students = new Student[n];

        }

            else return a.name.compareTo(b.name);

            this.total = c + m;
        }
    }
}

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main
{
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }
    static String ns() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.sval; }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        
        // ÕłøÕ╗║ HashMap’╝īµ│©µäÅÕ░¢µŗ¼ÕÅĘķćīÕ┐ģķĪ╗µś»ÕīģĶŻģń▒╗ String ÕÆī Integer
        HashMap<String, Integer> map = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            String name = ns();
            // ń╗ÅÕģĖĶ«Īńź©ÕåÖµ│Ģ’╝łĶāīõĖŗµØź’╝īµ×üÕģČÕźĮńö©’╝ē’╝Ü
            // getOrDefault(ÕÉŹÕŁŚ, 0)’╝ÜÕ”éµ×£ map ķćīµ£ēĶ┐ÖõĖ¬ÕÉŹÕŁŚ’╝īµŗ┐Õ«āńÜäńź©µĢ░’╝øÕ”éµ×£µ▓Īµ£ē’╝īÕĮōÕüÜ 0 ńź©ŃĆéńäČÕÉÄ +1ŃĆé
            map.put(name, map.getOrDefault(name, 0) + 1);
        }

        // µēŠµ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝
        String maxName = "";
        int maxVotes = 0;

        // ķüŹÕÄå HashMap ńÜäµĀćÕćåÕåÖµ│Ģ
        for (String key : map.keySet())
        {
            int votes = map.get(key);
            if (votes > maxVotes)
            {
                maxVotes = votes;
                maxName = key;
            }
        }

        System.out.println(maxName + " " + maxVotes);
    }
}

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main
{
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }
    static String ns() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return st.sval; }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        
        // Õ«Üõ╣ēµĀł’╝ÜDeque µÄźÕÅŻ + ArrayDeque Õ«×ńÄ░’╝łµ»öõ╝Āń╗¤ńÜä Stack ń▒╗Õ┐½ÕŠŚÕżÜ’╝ē
        Deque<Integer> stack = new ArrayDeque<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            String cmd = ns();
            
            // ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓µ»öĶŠāÕ┐ģķĪ╗ńö© equals’╝ü
            if (cmd.equals("push"))
            {
                int x = ni();
                stack.push(x);  // ÕÄŗµĀł
            } 
            else if (cmd.equals("pop"))
            {
                if (stack.isEmpty())
                {
                    System.out.println("empty");
                }
                else
                {
                    stack.pop(); // Õ╝╣µĀł’╝łµŚĀĶ┐öÕø×ÕĆ╝Ķ”üµ▒éµŚČńø┤µÄźÕ╝╣’╝ē
                }
            } 
            else if (cmd.equals("top"))
            {
                if (stack.isEmpty())
                {
                    System.out.println("empty");
                }
                else
                {
                    System.out.println(stack.peek()); // peek ÕÅ¬ń£ŗµĀłķĪČ’╝īõĖŹÕ╝╣Õć║µØź
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

import java.util.*;

public class Main
{
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni(); // µĢ░ń╗äķĢ┐Õ║”
        int q = ni(); // Ķ»óķŚ«µ¼ĪµĢ░
        
        // µŖĆÕĘ¦’╝ÜÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆīµĢ░ń╗äÕ╝ĆÕż¦õĖĆńé╣’╝īõĖŗµĀćõ╗Ä 1 Õ╝ĆÕ¦ŗ’╝īõĖöńö© long ķś▓µŁóµĢ░ÕĆ╝µ║óÕć║
        long[] sum = new long[n + 1]; 
        
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        {
            int x = ni();
            // µ×äÕ╗║ÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī’╝ÜÕĮōÕēŹÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī = õĖŖõĖĆõĖ¬ÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī + ÕĮōÕēŹµĢ░ÕŁŚ
            sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + x; 
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < q; i++)
        {
            int l = ni();
            int r = ni();
            // 3. O(1) µ¤źĶ»ó’╝ÜRńÜäÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī - (L-1)ńÜäÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī
            System.out.println(sum[r] - sum[l - 1]);

    }
}

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main
{
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }

    // ÕåÖõĖĆõĖ¬µŻĆµ¤źÕćĮµĢ░’╝ÜÕ”éµ×£ÕłćķĢ┐Õ║”õĖ║ mid’╝īĶāĮÕłćÕć║ÕżÜÕ░æµĀ╣’╝¤
    static boolean check(int[] arr, int mid, int k)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int len : arr) {
            count += len / mid; // µ»ÅµĀ╣ń╗│ÕŁÉĶāĮµÅÉõŠøÕćĀµ«Ą
        }
        return count >= k; // Õż¤õĖŹÕż¤ K µĀ╣’╝¤
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        int k = ni();
        int[] arr = new int[n];
        
        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            arr[i] = ni();
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, arr[i]); // µēŠÕł░µ£ĆķĢ┐ńÜäķéŻµĀ╣ń╗│ÕŁÉõĮ£õĖ║õ║īÕłåõĖŖķÖÉ
        }
        
        // ń╗ÅÕģĖńÜäõ║īÕłåµ©ĪµØ┐
        int left = 1, right = maxLen;
        int ans = 0;  // Ķ«░ÕĮĢµ£Ćń╗łńŁöµĪł
        
        while (left <= right)
        {
            int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;  // ķś▓µ║óÕć║ÕåÖµ│Ģ
            if (check(arr, mid, k))
            {
                ans = mid;       // µŚóńäČķĢ┐Õ║”õĖ║ mid ĶāĮµ╗ĪĶČ│’╝īĶ«░ÕĮĢõĖŗµØź
                left = mid + 1;  // Õ╣ČõĖöÕ░ØĶ»ĢĶāĮõĖŹĶāĮÕłćÕŠŚµø┤ķĢ┐
            }
            else
            {
                right = mid - 1; // µ╗ĪĶČ│õĖŹõ║å’╝īĶ»┤µśÄÕłćÕż¬ķĢ┐õ║å’╝īń╝®ń¤ŁõĖĆńé╣
            }
        }
        
        System.out.println(ans);
    }
}

Õ┐ģĶĆāń«Śµ│ĢõĖē’╝Üµ£ĆÕż¦Õģ¼ń║”µĢ░ (GCD) õĖÄ µ£ĆÕ░ÅÕģ¼ÕĆŹµĢ░ (LCM)

ĶĆāńé╣’╝ÜµĢ░Ķ«║Õ¤║ńĪĆŃĆé C++ vs Java ńÜäÕż¦ÕØæ’╝ÜÕ£© C++ õĖŁ’╝īõĮĀµ£ē <numeric> ķćīńÜä std::gcd µł¢ĶĆģĶĆüÕ╝ÅńÜä __gcd()ŃĆé**õĮåÕ£© Java ķćī’╝īÕ«śµ¢╣µ▓Īµ£ēµÅÉõŠøń«Śµ£ĆÕż¦Õģ¼ń║”µĢ░ńÜäńÄ░µłÉÕćĮµĢ░’╝ü**õĮĀÕ┐ģķĪ╗Ķć¬ÕĘ▒ĶāīõĖŗĶ┐ÖõĖĆĶĪīõ╗ŻńĀü’╝īÕÉ”ÕłÖĶĆāĶ»Ģńó░Õł░ńø┤µÄźÕ╣▓ń×¬ń£╝ŃĆé

ķóśńø«Ķ”üµ▒é’╝Ü ĶŠōÕģźõĖżõĖ¬µŁŻµĢ┤µĢ░ AAA ÕÆī BBB’╝īĶŠōÕć║Õ«āõ╗¼ńÜäµ£ĆÕż¦Õģ¼ń║”µĢ░ÕÆīµ£ĆÕ░ÅÕģ¼ÕĆŹµĢ░ŃĆé

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main
{
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static long nl() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (long)st.nval; } // ńö©longķś▓µ║óÕć║

    // µ×üÕģČķćŹĶ”ü’╝üÕģ©ńĮæķĆÜńö©ńÜä 1 ĶĪīõ╗ŻńĀüµ▒éµ£ĆÕż¦Õģ¼ń║”µĢ░ (ĶŠŚĶĮ¼ńøĖķÖżµ│Ģ)
    static long gcd(long a, long b)
    {
        return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b);
    }

    // µ£ĆÕ░ÅÕģ¼ÕĆŹµĢ░ = õĖżµĢ░õ╣śń¦» / µ£ĆÕż¦Õģ¼ń║”µĢ░
    static long lcm(long a, long b)
    {
        return a / gcd(a, b) * b;  // ÕģłķÖżÕåŹõ╣ś’╝īķś▓µŁó a*b ńłå long ĶīāÕø┤
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception

    }
}

import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main
{
    static StreamTokenizer st = new StreamTokenizer(new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)));
    static int ni() throws Exception { st.nextToken(); return (int)st.nval; }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
    {
        int n = ni();
        int s = ni();
        int[] arr = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            arr[i] = ni();
        }

        // µ╗æÕŖ©ń¬ŚÕÅŻµĀĖÕ┐āķĆ╗ĶŠæ’╝Ü
        int left = 0;  // ń¬ŚÕÅŻÕĘ”ĶŠ╣ńĢī
        int sum = 0;  // ń¬ŚÕÅŻÕåģńÜäµĆ╗ÕÆī
        int minLen = Integer.MAX_VALUE;  // Ķ«░ÕĮĢµ£ĆÕ░ÅķĢ┐Õ║”

        // right µś»ń¬ŚÕÅŻÕÅ│ĶŠ╣ńĢī’╝īõĖŹµ¢ŁÕÉæÕÅ│µē®Õ▒Ģ
        for (int right = 0; right < n; right++)
        {
            sum += arr[right]; // µŖŖÕÅ│ĶŠ╣ńÜäµĢ░ÕÉāĶ┐øµØź

            // Õ”éµ×£ń¬ŚÕÅŻÕåģńÜäÕÆīÕż¤õ║å’╝īÕ░▒Õ╝ĆÕ¦ŗÕ░ØĶ»ĢµŖŖÕĘ”ĶŠ╣ÕÉÉÕć║µØź’╝łń╝®ń¤Łń¬ŚÕÅŻ’╝ē
            while (sum >= s)
            {
                minLen = Math.min(minLen, right - left + 1); // µø┤µ¢░µ£Ćń¤ŁķĢ┐Õ║”
                sum -= arr[left]; // ÕÉÉÕć║ÕĘ”ĶŠ╣ńĢīńÜäÕĆ╝
                left++;           // ÕĘ”ĶŠ╣ńĢīÕÅ│ń¦╗
            }
        }

        // Õ”éµ×£ minLen µ▓ĪÕÅśĶ┐ć’╝īĶ»┤µśÄµ▓Īµ£ēµēŠÕł░µ╗ĪĶČ│µØĪõ╗ČńÜä’╝īĶŠōÕć║ 0
        System.out.println(minLen == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : minLen);
    }
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>

{

	// ń¼¼õĖĆÕ▒éÕŠ¬ńÄ»’╝Üµ×ÜõĖŠµēĆµ£ēÕÅ»ĶāĮńÜäķĆēµŗ®µ¢╣µĪł’╝ł0 Õł░ 2^n - 1’╝ē
    for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); i++)

        for (int j = 0; j < n; j++)

            if (i & (1 << j))

        if (cur_sum == S)

bool isLeap(int y)
{
    return (y % 4 == 0 && y % 100 != 0) || (y % 400 == 0);
}

// 2. µ£łõ╗ĮÕż®µĢ░µĢ░ń╗ä’╝łÕŖĪÕ┐ģÕ╝Ć 13 ńÜäÕż¦Õ░Å’╝īõ╗Ä 1 Õ╝ĆÕ¦ŗńö©’╝ē

{
    if (m == 2 && isLeap(y)) return 29;
    return days[m];
}

    // ńø«µĀćÕ╣┤’╝Ütarget_y

    if (y == target_y && m == target_m && d == target_d) break;

    // 4. µŻĆµ¤źÕż®µĢ░µś»ÕÉ”ĶČģÕć║ÕĮōÕēŹµ£łõ╗ĮńÜäµ£ĆÕż¦Õż®µĢ░
    if (d > getDays(y, m))

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

// µ£łõ╗ĮÕż®µĢ░µēōĶĪ©’╝ł2µ£łÕ╣│Õ╣┤28Õż®’╝īķŚ░Õ╣┤Õ£©õ╗ŻńĀüķćīÕŹĢńŗ¼Õłżµ¢Ł’╝ē
int days[13] = {0, 31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31};

// µŻĆµ¤źµ¤ÉõĖ¬ 8 õĮŹµĢ░µŚźµ£¤µś»ÕÉ”ÕÉłµ│Ģ
bool check(int date)
{
    int y = date / 10000;        // µÅÉÕÅ¢ÕēŹ 4 õĮŹÕ╣┤õ╗Į
    int m = date % 10000 / 100;  // µÅÉÕÅ¢õĖŁķŚ┤ 2 õĮŹµ£łõ╗Į
    int d = date % 100;          // µÅÉÕÅ¢µ£ĆÕÉÄ 2 õĮŹÕż®µĢ░
    
    if (m < 1 || m > 12) return false;
    if (d < 1) return false;
    
    // Õłżµ¢ŁķŚ░Õ╣┤
    if (m == 2 && ((y % 4 == 0 && y % 100 != 0) || y % 400 == 0))
    {
        if (d > 29) return false;
    }
    else
    {
        if (d > days[m]) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

signed main()
{
    int start_date;
    cin >> start_date;
    int start_year = start_date / 10000;
    
    // ķ¬ŚÕłåµĀĖÕ┐ā’╝ÜõĖŹĶ”üõĖĆÕż®õĖĆÕż®ÕŖĀ’╝üńø┤µÄźµ×ÜõĖŠÕ╣┤õ╗Į’╝łÕüćĶ«Šµ£ĆÕżÜÕł░ 9999 Õ╣┤’╝ē
    for (int y = start_year; y <= 9999; y++)
    {
        // C++11’╝Üńö©ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓µŗ╝µÄźµ×äķĆĀÕø×µ¢ćµŚźµ£¤
        string s_y = to_string(y);  // õŠŗÕ”é "2021"
        string s_m_d = s_y;  // ÕżŹÕłČõĖĆõ╗Į
        reverse(s_m_d.begin(), s_m_d.end());  // ń┐╗ĶĮ¼ÕÅśµłÉ "1202"
        
        string s_date = s_y + s_m_d;  // µŗ╝ÕćæµłÉ "20211202"
        int date = stoi(s_date);  // ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ĶĮ¼Õø×µĢ┤µĢ░
        
        // Õ”éµ×£µ×äķĆĀÕć║ńÜäµŚźµ£¤ > ĶŠōÕģźńÜäµŚźµ£¤’╝īõĖöµŚźµ£¤µś»ÕÉłµ│ĢńÜä
        if (date > start_date && check(date))
        {
            cout << date << endl;
            break; // µēŠÕł░ń¼¼õĖĆõĖ¬Õ░▒ń╗ōµØ¤
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'

// 1. µ£łõ╗ĮÕż®µĢ░µĢ░ń╗ä
signed days[13] = {0, 31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31};
// 2. ķŚ░Õ╣┤Õłżµ¢Ł
bool isLeap(int y)
{
    return (y % 4 == 0 && y % 100 != 0) || (y % 400 == 0);
}
// 3. µÅÉÕÅ¢ÕĮōµ£łÕż®µĢ░
signed getDays(int y, int m)
{
    if (m == 2 && isLeap(y)) return 29;
    return days[m];
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false); cin.tie(0); cout.tie(0);  // Õģ│µĄü

    // ÕłØÕ¦ŗńŖČµĆüĶ«ŠńĮ«
    int y = 2000, m = 1, d = 1, w = 6;  // ķóśńø«ń╗Öõ║å 2000Õ╣┤1µ£ł1µŚźµś»Õæ©ÕģŁ
    int end_y = 2020, end_m = 10, end_d = 1;  // ń╗ōµØ¤µŚźµ£¤
    int total_km = 0;  // Ķ«░ÕĮĢµĆ╗Õģ¼ķćīµĢ░
    
    while (true)
    {
        // ÕżäńÉåÕĮōÕż®
        if (w == 1 || d == 1)
        {
            // Õ”éµ×£µś»Õæ©õĖĆ’╝īµł¢ĶĆģµś»µ»ÅõĖ¬µ£łńÜä1ÕÅĘ
            total_km += 2;
        }
        else
        {
            // µŁŻÕĖĖµāģÕåĄ
            total_km += 1;
        }
        
        // Õłżµ¢Łµś»ÕÉ”Õł░ĶŠŠµ£ĆÕÉÄõĖĆÕż®’╝īÕł░õ║åÕ░▒ĶĘ│Õć║ÕŠ¬ńÄ»
        if (y == end_y && m == end_m && d == end_d)
        {
            break; 
        }
        
        // Ķ┐øÕģźõĖŗõĖĆÕż®
        d++;
        w++;
        if (w == 8) w = 1; // õ┐ØĶ»üµś¤µ£¤Õ£© 1~7 õ╣ŗķŚ┤ÕŠ¬ńÄ»
        
        if (d > getDays(y, m))
        {
            // Õ”éµ×£Ķ┐ÖÕż®ĶČģĶ┐ćõ║åÕĮōµ£łńÜäµ£ĆÕż¦Õż®µĢ░
            d = 1;  // ÕÅśµłÉõĖŗõĖ¬µ£ł 1ÕÅĘ
            m++;
            if (m == 13)  // Õ”éµ×£ĶČģÕć║õ║å 12µ£ł
            {
                m = 1;  // ÕÅśµłÉµśÄÕ╣┤ńÜä 1µ£ł
                y++;
            }
        }
    }
    
    cout << total_km << endl;  // µ£¼ķóśµŁŻńĪ«ńŁöµĪłµś» 8879
    return 0;
}

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

const int MAXN = 100005;
int cnt[MAXN]; // Ķ«░ÕĮĢµ»Åń¦ŹõĮÖµĢ░Õć║ńÄ░ńÜäµ¼ĪµĢ░
int ans = 0;   

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false); cin.tie(0); cout.tie(0);  // Õģ│µĄü
    
    int n, k;
    cin >> n >> k;
    
    int sum = 0; 
    cnt[0] = 1;  // õĮÖµĢ░õĖ║ 0 µ£¼Ķ║½Õ░▒µś»õĖĆõĖ¬ÕÉłµ│ĢńÜä k ÕĆŹÕī║ķŚ┤’╝üÕ┐ģķĪ╗ÕłØÕ¦ŗÕī¢õĖ║ 1
    
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        int x;
        cin >> x;
        sum = (sum + x) % k;  // ĶŠ╣Ķ»╗Õģź’╝īĶŠ╣µ▒éÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī’╝īĶŠ╣ÕÅ¢µ©Ī
        
        // Õ”éµ×£õ╣ŗÕēŹõ╣¤Õć║ńÄ░Ķ┐ćõĮÖµĢ░õĖ║ sum ńÜäÕēŹń╝ĆÕÆī’╝īÕ«āõ╗¼õ╣ŗķŚ┤ńÜäÕī║ķŚ┤ÕÆīÕ░▒µś» k ńÜäÕĆŹµĢ░
        // ÕÅ»õ╗źńø┤µÄźµŖŖõ╣ŗÕēŹÕć║ńÄ░ńÜäµ¼ĪµĢ░ń┤»ÕŖĀÕł░ńŁöµĪłķćī
        ans += cnt[sum];
        
        // ÕĮōÕēŹõĮÖµĢ░Õć║ńÄ░ńÜäµ¼ĪµĢ░ + 1
        cnt[sum]++; 
    }
    
    cout << ans << "\n";
    return 0;
}
/*
ĶŠōÕģź’╝Ü
4 2
1 1 2 1
ĶŠōÕć║’╝Ü
4
*/

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define endl '\n'
#define int long long
using namespace std;

const int MAXN = 100005;
int h[MAXN], w[MAXN];
int n, k;

// check ÕćĮµĢ░’╝ÜÕłżµ¢ŁÕüćĶ«ŠĶŠ╣ķĢ┐õĖ║ mid µŚČ’╝īĶāĮõĖŹĶāĮÕłćÕć║Ķć│Õ░æ k ÕØŚ
bool check(int mid)
{
    int res = 0;  // ÕłćÕć║ńÜäµĆ╗ÕØŚµĢ░’╝īÕÅ»ĶāĮÕŠłÕż¦’╝īńö© long long
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        res += (h[i] / mid) * (w[i] / mid); 
        if (res >= k) return true;  // õĖĆµŚ”Õż¤õ║åµÅÉÕēŹĶ┐öÕø×’╝īÕŖĀķĆ¤’╝ü
    }
    return false;  // Õģ©ÕłćÕ«īõ║åķāĮõĖŹÕż¤ k ÕØŚ
}

signed main()
{
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false); cin.tie(0); cout.tie(0);  // Õģ│µĄü

    cin >> n >> k;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        cin >> h[i] >> w[i];
    }
    
    // Õ╝ĆÕ¦ŗõ║īÕłåńŁöµĪł’╝łĶŠ╣ķĢ┐ĶīāÕø┤’╝Ü1 Õł░ 100000’╝ē
    int l = 1, r = 100000; 
    while (l < r)
    {
        // µĀĖÕ┐ā’╝Üµ▒éŌĆ£µ£ĆÕż¦ÕĆ╝ŌĆØ’╝īÕŹ│Õ░ĮķćÅÕŠĆÕÅ│µēŠ’╝īmid Ķ«Īń«ŚÕ┐ģķĪ╗ +1’╝ü
        int mid = l + (r - l) / 2 + 1; 
        
        if (check(mid))
        {
            // Õ”éµ×£ mid ĶŠ╣ķĢ┐ĶāĮÕłćÕż¤’╝īĶ»┤µśÄńŁöµĪłÕÅ»ĶāĮÕ░▒µś» mid’╝īµł¢ĶĆģĶ┐śĶāĮµø┤Õż¦
            l = mid; 
        }
        else 
        {
            // Õ”éµ×£ÕłćõĖŹÕż¤’╝īĶ»┤µśÄ mid Õż¬Õż¦õ║å’╝īńŁöµĪłõĖĆÕ«ÜÕ£© mid ÕĘ”ĶŠ╣
            r = mid - 1;
        }
    }
    
    cout << l << endl; // µ£Ćń╗ł l ÕÆī r õ╝ÜńøĖķüć’╝īĶŠōÕć║ l ÕŹ│ÕÅ»
    return 0;
}

2 10
6 5
5 6
ĶŠōÕć║’╝Ü
2
*/

ÕøøŃĆü Õ¤║ńĪĆµĢ░Ķ«║õĖÄµĢ░ÕŁ”’╝łC++Ķć¬ÕĖ”Õż¢µīé’╝ē

1. µ£ĆÕż¦Õģ¼ń║”µĢ░ (GCD) õĖÄµ£ĆÕ░ÅÕģ¼ÕĆŹµĢ░ (LCM)

õĖŹĶ”üµēŗÕåÖĶŠŚĶĮ¼ńøĖķÖżµ│Ģõ║å’╝īńø┤µÄźńö© C++11 ÕåģńĮ«ÕćĮµĢ░’╝ü õ╗ŻńĀü’╝Ü

#include <bits/stdc++.h>

    int d = a[1] - a[0];

    }

    if (d == 0)

// ń║¦Õł½1’╝ÜÕŹĢõĖ¬µĢ░Õłżµ¢Ł’╝łO(ŌłÜN)’╝ē- ÕĪ½ń®║ķóśÕĖĖńö©
bool isPrime(int n)
{
    if (n < 2) return false;
    for (int i = 2; i * i <= n; i++)  // Õ┐ģķĪ╗ÕåÖ i*i <= n
    {
        if (n % i == 0) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

// ń║¦Õł½2’╝ÜÕ¤āµ░ÅńŁøµ│Ģ’╝łµ▒é 1~N õ╗źÕåģńÜäµēĆµ£ēń┤ĀµĢ░’╝ē- ń╝¢ń©ŗķóśµÅÉķĆ¤ńö©
const int MAX = 100005;
bool st[MAX];  // false ĶĪ©ńż║µś»ń┤ĀµĢ░
void sieve()
{
    st[0] = st[1] = true;
    for (int i = 2; i * i < MAX; i++)
    {
        if (!st[i])
        {
            for (int j = i * i; j < MAX; j += i)
            {
                st[j] = true; // µŖŖń┤ĀµĢ░ńÜäÕĆŹµĢ░ńŁøµÄē
            }
        }
    }
}

int qpow(int a, int b, int p)
{

    while (b > 0)

        b >>= 1;  // µīćµĢ░ÕÅ│ń¦╗õĖĆõĮŹ
    }

// 01_variables_and_types.rs - ÕÅśķćÅõĖÄµĢ░µŹ«ń▒╗Õ×ŗ

fn main()
{
    // ========================
    // 1. ÕÅśķćÅń╗æÕ«Ü (Variable Binding)
    // ========================
    
    // õĖŹÕÅ»ÕÅśÕÅśķćÅ - ķ╗śĶ«żµāģÕåĄõĖŗÕÅśķćÅµś»õĖŹÕÅ»ÕÅśńÜä
    let x = 5;
    println!("x ńÜäÕĆ╝µś»: {}", x);
    
    // ÕÅ»ÕÅśÕÅśķćÅ - õĮ┐ńö© mut Õģ│ķö«ÕŁŚ
    let mut y = 10;
    println!("y ńÜäÕłØÕ¦ŗÕĆ╝µś»: {}", y);
    y = 15;  // õ┐«µö╣ÕÅ»ÕÅśÕÅśķćÅ
    println!("y ńÜäµ¢░ÕĆ╝µś»: {}", y);
    
    // ÕĖĖķćÅ - Õ┐ģķĪ╗µīćÕ«Üń▒╗Õ×ŗ’╝īõĮ┐ńö© const Õģ│ķö«ÕŁŚ
    const MAX_POINTS: u32 = 100_000;
    println!("µ£ĆÕż¦ńé╣µĢ░µś»: {}", MAX_POINTS);
    
    // ķÜÉĶŚÅ (Shadowing) - ÕÅ»õ╗źńö©ńøĖÕÉīÕÉŹń¦░ķćŹµ¢░ÕŻ░µśÄÕÅśķćÅ
    let z = 5;
    let z = z + 1;
    let z = z * 2;
    println!("ķĆÜĶ┐ćķÜÉĶŚÅ’╝īz ńÜäµ£Ćń╗łÕĆ╝µś»: {}", z);  // ĶŠōÕć║ 12
    
    // ========================
    // 2. µĀćķćÅµĢ░µŹ«ń▒╗Õ×ŗ (Scalar Types)
    // ========================
    
    // µĢ┤µĢ░ń▒╗Õ×ŗ (Integer Types)
    let signed_i8: i8 = -128;        // 8õĮŹµ£ēń¼”ÕÅĘµĢ┤µĢ░
    let unsigned_u8: u8 = 255;       // 8õĮŹµŚĀń¼”ÕÅĘµĢ┤µĢ░
    let default_i32: i32 = 42;       // ķ╗śĶ«żõĖ║ i32
    let isize_example: isize = -10;  // µīćķÆłÕż¦Õ░ÅńÜäµĢ┤µĢ░’╝łÕ£©64õĮŹń│╗ń╗¤õĖŖķĆÜÕĖĖµś»64õĮŹ’╝ē
    
    println!("i8: {}, u8: {}, i32: {}, isize: {}", 
             signed_i8, unsigned_u8, default_i32, isize_example);
    
    // µĄ«ńé╣ń▒╗Õ×ŗ (Floating-Point Types)
    let x_f64 = 2.0;       // f64’╝īķ╗śĶ«żµĄ«ńé╣ń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    let y_f32: f32 = 3.0;  // f32’╝īµśŠÕ╝ÅµīćÕ«Üń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    
    println!("f64: {}, f32: {}", x_f64, y_f32);
    
    // ÕĖāÕ░öń▒╗Õ×ŗ (Boolean Type)
    let t = true;
    let f: bool = false;  // µśŠÕ╝ÅµīćÕ«Üń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    
    println!("ÕĖāÕ░öÕĆ╝ t: {}, f: {}", t, f);
    
    // ÕŁŚń¼”ń▒╗Õ×ŗ (Character Type)
    let c = 'z';
    let unicode_char = 'õĖŁ';  // Rust ńÜä char ń▒╗Õ×ŗµś» Unicode µĀćķćÅÕĆ╝
    
    println!("ÕŁŚń¼” c: {}, õĖŁµ¢ćÕŁŚń¼”: {}", c, unicode_char);
    
    // ========================
    // 3. ÕżŹÕÉłµĢ░µŹ«ń▒╗Õ×ŗ (Compound Types)
    // ========================
    
    // Õģāń╗ä (Tuple) - Õø║Õ«ÜķĢ┐Õ║”’╝īÕÅ»õ╗źÕīģÕÉ½õĖŹÕÉīń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    let tup: (i32, f64, u8) = (500, 6.4, 1);
    
    // Ķ¦Żµ×äÕģāń╗ä
    let (x, y, z) = tup;
    println!("Ķ¦Żµ×äÕģāń╗ä: x = {}, y = {}, z = {}", x, y, z);
    
    // Ķ«┐ķŚ«Õģāń╗äÕģāń┤Ā
    let five_hundred = tup.0;
    let six_point_four = tup.1;
    let one = tup.2;
    println!("Õģāń╗äÕģāń┤Ā: {} {} {}", five_hundred, six_point_four, one);
    
    // µĢ░ń╗ä (Array) - Õø║Õ«ÜķĢ┐Õ║”’╝īńøĖÕÉīń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    let arr = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];  // µÄ©µ¢Łń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    let explicit_arr: [i32; 5] = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];  // µśŠÕ╝ÅµīćÕ«Üń▒╗Õ×ŗÕÆīķĢ┐Õ║”
    let filled_arr = [3; 5];  // ÕłøÕ╗║ [3, 3, 3, 3, 3]
    
    println!("µĢ░ń╗ä arr: {:?}", arr);
    println!("µśŠÕ╝ÅµĢ░ń╗ä: {:?}", explicit_arr);
    println!("ÕĪ½ÕģģµĢ░ń╗ä: {:?}", filled_arr);
    
    // Ķ«┐ķŚ«µĢ░ń╗äÕģāń┤Ā
    let first_element = arr[0];
    println!("µĢ░ń╗äń¼¼õĖĆõĖ¬Õģāń┤Ā: {}", first_element);
}

// 03_control_flow.rs - µĄüń©ŗµÄ¦ÕłČ

fn main()
{
    // ========================
    // 1. if/else ĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Å
    // ========================
    
    let number = 3;
    
    if number < 5
    {
        println!("µØĪõ╗ČõĖ║ń£¤");
    }
    else
    {
        println!("µØĪõ╗ČõĖ║Õüć");
    }
    
    // if õĮ£õĖ║ĶĪ©ĶŠŠÕ╝Åńö©õ║ÄĶĄŗÕĆ╝
    let condition = true;
    let number = if condition { 5 } else { 6 };  // µ│©µäÅ’╝ÜÕłåµö»ńÜäĶ┐öÕø×ń▒╗Õ×ŗÕ┐ģķĪ╗ńøĖÕÉī
    println!("number ńÜäÕĆ╝µś»: {}", number);
    
    // ÕżÜķćŹµØĪõ╗ČÕłżµ¢Ł
    let num = 6;
    
    if num % 4 == 0
    {
        println!("{} ÕÅ»õ╗źĶó½ 4 µĢ┤ķÖż", num);
    }
    else if num % 3 == 0
    {
        println!("{} ÕÅ»õ╗źĶó½ 3 µĢ┤ķÖż", num);
    }
    else if num % 2 == 0
    {
        println!("{} ÕÅ»õ╗źĶó½ 2 µĢ┤ķÖż", num);
    }
    else
    {
        println!("{} õĖŹĶāĮĶó½ 4ŃĆü3 µł¢ 2 µĢ┤ķÖż", num);
    }
    
    // ========================
    // 2. ÕŠ¬ńÄ» (Loops)
    // ========================
    
    // loop - µŚĀķÖÉÕŠ¬ńÄ»
    let mut counter = 0;
    
    let result = loop
    {
        counter += 1;
        
        if counter == 10
        {
            break counter * 2;  // õ╗ÄÕŠ¬ńÄ»Ķ┐öÕø×ÕĆ╝
        }
    };
    
    println!("loop ÕŠ¬ńÄ»ńÜäń╗ōµ×£µś»: {}", result);
    
    // while - µØĪõ╗ČÕŠ¬ńÄ»
    let mut number = 3;
    
    while number != 0
    {
        println!("{}!", number);
        number -= 1;
    }
    
    println!("while ÕŠ¬ńÄ»ń╗ōµØ¤!");
    
    // for - ķüŹÕÄåķøåÕÉłµł¢ĶīāÕø┤
    let a = [10, 20, 30, 40, 50];
    
    // õĮ┐ńö© for ÕŠ¬ńÄ»ķüŹÕÄåµĢ░ń╗ä
    for element in a.iter()
    {
        println!("µĢ░ń╗äÕģāń┤Ā: {}", element);
    }
    
    // õĮ┐ńö© for ÕÆī range ķüŹÕÄåµĢ░ÕŁŚĶīāÕø┤
    println!("ÕĆÆĶ«ĪµŚČ:");

    // ÕĘ”ķŚŁÕÅ│Õ╝Ć 1..4 µś» 1’╝ī2’╝ī3
    for number in (1..4).rev()  // rev() ÕÅŹĶĮ¼ĶīāÕø┤
    {
        println!("{}!", number);
    }
    println!("ÕÅæÕ░ä!");
    
    // ========================
    // 3. match µÄ¦ÕłČµĄü
    // ========================
    
    // match ń▒╗õ╝╝õ║ÄÕģČõ╗¢Ķ»ŁĶ©ĆńÜä switch’╝īõĮåµø┤Õ╝║Õż¦õĖöÕ┐ģķĪ╗ń®ĘÕ░ĮµēĆµ£ēÕÅ»ĶāĮµĆ¦ŃĆé

    let dice_roll = 9;
    
    match dice_roll
    {
        3 => println!("ĶÄĘÕŠŚÕź¢ÕŖ▒!"),
        7 => println!("µĖĖµłÅń╗ōµØ¤!"),
        other => println!("ń¦╗ÕŖ© {} µŁź.", other),  // other µś»õĖĆõĖ¬ķĆÜķģŹÕÅśķćÅ’╝īõ╝Üń╗æÕ«ÜµēĆµ£ēµ£¬Ķó½ÕēŹķØóÕłåµö»Õī╣ķģŹńÜäÕĆ╝’╝łĶ┐Öķćīµś»ķÖż 3 ÕÆī 7 Õż¢ńÜäµēĆµ£ēÕĆ╝’╝ē
    }
    
    // match õĖÄķĆēķĪ╣ń▒╗Õ×ŗ (ń©ŹÕÉÄÕ£©µ×ÜõĖŠķā©ÕłåĶ»”ń╗åõ╗ŗń╗Ź)
    let some_value = Some(3);
    
    // Option µ£ēõĖżõĖ¬ÕÅśõĮō’╝ÜSome(T) ĶĪ©ńż║µ£ēÕĆ╝’╝īNone ĶĪ©ńż║µŚĀÕĆ╝ŃĆé
    match some_value
    {
        Some(3) => println!("µēŠÕł░õ║åÕĆ╝ 3!"),      // õ╗ģÕī╣ķģŹ Some(3)’╝ī3 Ķó½Ķ¦Żµ×äÕć║µØźŃĆé
        Some(x) => println!("µēŠÕł░õ║åÕĆ╝: {}", x),  // Õī╣ķģŹõ╗╗õĮĢ Some’╝īÕ╣ČÕ░åÕåģķā©ÕĆ╝ń╗æÕ«ÜÕł░ÕÅśķćÅ xŃĆé
        None => println!("µ▓Īµ£ēµēŠÕł░õ╗╗õĮĢÕĆ╝"),       // ÕżäńÉå None µāģÕåĄŃĆéµ│©µäÅ’╝Ümatch Õ┐ģķĪ╗Ķ”åńø¢ None’╝īÕÉ”ÕłÖń╝¢Ķ»æµŖźķöÖ’╝īĶ┐ÖÕ╝║ÕłČõĮĀÕżäńÉåń®║ÕĆ╝’╝īķü┐ÕģŹń®║µīćķÆłÕ╝éÕĖĖŃĆé
    }
    
    // ========================
    // 4. if let ń«ĆÕī¢Õī╣ķģŹ
    // ========================
    
    // ÕĮōÕÅ¬Õģ│Õ┐āõĖĆń¦Źµ©ĪÕ╝ÅµŚČ’╝īõĮ┐ńö© if let µø┐õ╗Ż match
    // ńŁēõ╗Ęõ║Ä match { Some(3) => ..., _ => () }
    if let Some(3) = some_value
    {
        println!("if let: µēŠÕł░õ║åÕĆ╝ 3!");
    }
    
    // ÕĖ” else ÕŁÉÕÅźńÜä if let
    let config_max = Some(3u8);
    
    match config_max
    {
        Some(max) => println!("µ£ĆÕż¦ķģŹńĮ«µś» {}", max),
        _ => (),  // Õ┐ĮńĢźÕģČõ╗¢µāģÕåĄ’╝īõ╗Ćõ╣łķāĮõĖŹÕüÜ’╝īõĮåÕ┐ģķĪ╗ÕåÖ
    }
    
    // ńŁēõ╗ĘńÜä if let ÕĮóÕ╝Å
    if let Some(max) = config_max
    {
        println!("if let: µ£ĆÕż¦ķģŹńĮ«µś» {}", max);
    }
    else
    {
        println!("if let: µ▓Īµ£ēķģŹńĮ«ÕĆ╝");  // Ķ┐ÖķćīÕżäńÉå None ńÜäµāģÕåĄ’╝īÕÅ»õ╗źń£üńĢźõĖŹÕåÖ
    }
}

// 04_ownership.rs - µēĆµ£ēµØā

fn main()
{
    // ========================
    // 1. µēĆµ£ēµØāńÜäÕ¤║µ£¼µ”éÕ┐Ą
    // ========================
    
    // ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕŁŚķØóķćÅ vs ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ń▒╗Õ×ŗ
    let s1 = "ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ÕŁŚķØóķćÅ";  // ÕŁśÕé©Õ£©µĀłõĖŖ’╝īõĖŹÕÅ»ÕÅś
    let mut s2 = String::from("ÕĀåÕłåķģŹÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓");  // ÕŁśÕé©Õ£©ÕĀåõĖŖ’╝īÕÅ»ÕÅś
    
    // õ┐«µö╣ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓
    s2.push_str(", Ķ┐ĮÕŖĀÕåģÕ«╣");
    println!("{}", s2);
    
    // ========================
    // 2. ń¦╗ÕŖ© (Move)
    // ========================
    
    let s1 = String::from("hello");
    let s2 = s1;  // s1 ńÜäÕĆ╝Ķó½ń¦╗ÕŖ©Õł░ s2’╝īs1 õĖŹÕåŹµ£ēµĢł
    
    // println!("{}, world!", s1);  // Ķ┐ÖĶĪīõ╗ŻńĀüõ╝ÜµŖźķöÖ’╝üÕøĀõĖ║ s1 ÕĘ▓ń╗ÅµŚĀµĢłõ║å
    
    println!("{}, world!", s2);  // µŁŻńĪ«’╝Üs2 µŗźµ£ēÕĆ╝
    
    // µĢ┤µĢ░ń▒╗Õ×ŗńÜäÕżŹÕłČ (Copy trait)
    let x = 5;
    let y = x;  // x Õ«×ńÄ░õ║å Copy trait’╝īµēĆõ╗źĶ┐Öķćīµś»ÕżŹÕłČĶĆīõĖŹµś»ń¦╗ÕŖ©
    
    println!("x = {}, y = {}", x, y);  // õĖżõĖ¬ÕÅśķćÅķāĮÕÅ»õ╗źõĮ┐ńö©
    
    // ========================
    // 3. ÕćĮµĢ░õĖŁńÜäµēĆµ£ēµØā
    // ========================
    
    let s = String::from("hello");  // s Ķ┐øÕģźõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤
    
    takes_ownership(s);  // s ńÜäÕĆ╝ń¦╗ÕŖ©Õł░ÕćĮµĢ░ķćī’╝īs õ╗ÄµŁżõĖŹÕåŹµ£ēµĢł
    
    // println!("{}", s);  // ķöÖĶ»»’╝üs ÕĘ▓ń╗ÅĶó½ń¦╗ÕŖ©õ║å
    
    let x = 5;  // x Ķ┐øÕģźõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤
    
    makes_copy(x);  // x Õ║öĶ»źĶó½ÕżŹÕłČ’╝īÕøĀõĖ║Õ«āÕ«×ńÄ░õ║å Copy trait
    
    println!("x Õ£©ÕćĮµĢ░Ķ░āńö©ÕÉÄõ╗ŹńäČÕÅ»ńö©: {}", x);  // µŁŻńĪ«’╝üx õ╗ŹńäČµ£ēµĢł
    
    // ========================
    // 4. Ķ┐öÕø×ÕĆ╝ÕÆīõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤
    // ========================
    
    let s1 = gives_ownership();  // ÕćĮµĢ░Ķ┐öÕø×ÕĆ╝ń¦╗ÕŖ©ń╗Ö s1
    
    let s2 = String::from("hello");  // s2 Ķ┐øÕģźõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤
    
    let s3 = takes_and_gives_back(s2);  // s2 Ķó½ń¦╗ÕŖ©Õł░ÕćĮµĢ░’╝īĶ┐öÕø×ÕĆ╝ń¦╗ÕŖ©ń╗Ö s3
    
    println!("s1: {}, s3: {}", s1, s3);
    
    // ========================
    // 5. Õ╝Ģńö©ÕÆīÕĆ¤ńö© (References & Borrowing)
    // ========================
    
    let s1 = String::from("hello");
    
    let len = calculate_length(&s1);  // &s1 ÕłøÕ╗║Õ»╣ s1 ńÜäÕ╝Ģńö©’╝īõĖŹĶÄĘÕÅ¢µēĆµ£ēµØā
    
    println!("ÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓ '{}' ńÜäķĢ┐Õ║”µś» {}.", s1, len);  // s1 õ╗ŹńäČµ£ēµĢł
    
    // ÕÅ»ÕÅśÕ╝Ģńö©
    let mut s = String::from("hello");
    
    change(&mut s);  // õ╝ĀķĆÆÕÅ»ÕÅśÕ╝Ģńö©
    
    println!("õ┐«µö╣ÕÉÄńÜäÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓: {}", s);
    
    // ========================
    // 6. µé¼Õ×éÕ╝Ģńö© (Dangling References) - Rust õ╝Üķś▓µŁóĶ┐Öń¦ŹµāģÕåĄ
    // ========================
    
    // let reference_to_nothing = dangle();  // Ķ┐ÖõĖ¬ÕćĮµĢ░õĖŹĶāĮń╝¢Ķ»æķĆÜĶ┐ć
    
    let no_dangle_result = no_dangle();
    println!("no_dangle Ķ┐öÕø×ńÜäÕŁŚń¼”õĖ▓: {}", no_dangle_result);
}

// ĶÄĘÕÅ¢µēĆµ£ēµØāńÜäÕćĮµĢ░
fn takes_ownership(some_string: String)  // some_string Ķ┐øÕģźõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤
{
    println!("{}", some_string);
}  // some_string ń”╗Õ╝ĆõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤Õ╣ČĶó½õĖóÕ╝ā

// ÕżŹÕłČÕĆ╝ńÜäÕćĮµĢ░
fn makes_copy(some_integer: i32)  // some_integer Ķ┐øÕģźõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤
{
    println!("{}", some_integer);
}  // some_integer ń”╗Õ╝ĆõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤’╝īõĮåÕ«āµś» Copy ń▒╗Õ×ŗ’╝īµēĆõ╗źµ▓Īõ╗Ćõ╣łńē╣Õł½ńÜä

// Ķ┐öÕø×µēĆµ£ēµØāńÜäÕćĮµĢ░
fn gives_ownership() -> String  // Ķ┐öÕø×ÕĆ╝ń¦╗ÕŖ©Õł░Ķ░āńö©ÕćĮµĢ░
{
    let some_string = String::from("hello");
    some_string  // some_string Ķó½Ķ┐öÕø×Õ╣Čń¦╗õ║żń╗ÖĶ░āńö©ÕćĮµĢ░
}

// ĶÄĘÕÅ¢Õ╣ČĶ┐öÕø×µēĆµ£ēµØāńÜäÕćĮµĢ░
fn takes_and_gives_back(a_string: String) -> String  // a_string Ķ┐øÕģź
{
    a_string  // Ķ┐öÕø× a_string’╝īń¦╗ÕŖ©ń╗ÖĶ░āńö©ĶĆģ
}

// õĮ┐ńö©Õ╝Ģńö©ńÜäÕćĮµĢ░ - õĖŹĶÄĘÕÅ¢µēĆµ£ēµØā
fn calculate_length(s: &String) -> usize  // s µś»Õ»╣ String ńÜäÕ╝Ģńö©
{
    s.len()  // ĶÄĘÕÅ¢ķĢ┐Õ║”õĮåõĖŹĶÄĘÕÅ¢µēĆµ£ēµØā
}  // s ń”╗Õ╝ĆõĮ£ńö©Õ¤¤’╝īõĮåÕ«āõĖŹµŗźµ£ēÕ╝Ģńö©ńÜäµĢ░µŹ«’╝īµēĆõ╗źõĖŹõ╝ÜÕÅæńö¤õ╗╗õĮĢõ║ŗµāģ

// õĮ┐ńö©ÕÅ»ÕÅśÕ╝Ģńö©ńÜäÕćĮµĢ░
fn change(some_string: &mut String)
{
    some_string.push_str(", world");
}

// µ╝öńż║µé¼Õ×éÕ╝Ģńö©ķŚ«ķóś’╝łĶ┐ÖõĖ¬ÕćĮµĢ░õĖŹõ╝Üń╝¢Ķ»æ’╝ē
/*
fn dangle() -> &String  // dangle Ķ┐öÕø×õĖĆõĖ¬Õ»╣ String ńÜäÕ╝Ģńö©
{
    let s = String::from("hello");  // s µś»õĖĆõĖ¬µ¢░ńÜä String
